items.title: Business Analyst - Market Intelligence & Strategy
items.description:
About Us:

Everbright Health is a healthcare venture focused on transforming specialty practices. Backed by W Health Ventures and incubated by 2070 Health, we’re building an MSO platform that helps clinicians grow without adding operational burden. We’re starting in Interventional Psychiatry.

About the Role:

This is the first hire for our Go-To-Market function in India. You’ll work directly with the founding team to support market research, strategic analysis, and GTM execution across functions. This is a high-growth opportunity for early-career professionals looking to build depth and breadth in strategy and operations, with direct exposure to healthcare innovation and venture building.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Market Intelligence

· Conduct market, customer, and competitor research

· Track trends, consolidate insights, and share updates across the org

· Maintain a central knowledge base

2. Strategic Analysis

· Develop financial and operational models

· Translate research into decision-ready recommendations

· Assist in preparing strategy memos and investor materials

3. Growth Support

· Analyze new markets, partners, and services

· Contribute to marketing and sales materials

· Support core ops: presentations, reporting, project tracking

Qualifications:

· 1–3 years in consulting, business strategy, operations, or research

· Excellent analytical and communication skills

· Strong organizational skills with keen attention to detail

· Proficiency in PowerPoint, Excel, and data tools

· Preferred: Tier 1 undergraduate or postgraduate background

What We’re Looking For:

We’re seeking a candidate who is:

• Structured and analytical – able to break down ambiguous problems, build models, and synthesize insights into actionable recommendations

• Detail-oriented and highly organized – able to manage multiple projects without losing track

• Clear and concise in communication – skilled at distilling complex findings into crisp takeaways for different audiences

• Curious and entrepreneurial – energized by exploring new opportunities, learning from first principles, and working independently when needed

• Adaptive and motivated – quick to pick up new concepts and comfortable in a fast-paced, evolving startup environment

• Resilient and hands-on – willing to dive into foundational “grunt work” that comes with building something from scratch

• Ambitious – you see this role as a springboard toward leadership and greater responsibilities in a growing venture

Career Growth:

· Lead Everbright Health India’s market intelligence function

· Contribute to sales, marketing, and partnership strategies

· Step into broader roles in strategy and operations over time

Why Join Us?

You’ll be joining at the ground floor of a mission-driven venture, working closely with the founding team to shape healthcare delivery in India. This role offers a unique mix of strategic exposure and hands-on execution, setting you up for accelerated growth in strategy, operations, and leadership.

items.title: Performance Marketing Manager
items.description:
Performance Marketing Manager

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India (On-site)

Team: Growth/Marketing

The Role

We are looking for a hands-on Performance Marketing Manager to drive user acquisition through high-impact paid campaigns across digital channels.

Responsibilities

  • Plan, launch, and optimise paid campaigns across Google, Meta, YouTube, and other channels
  • Drive high-quality lead acquisition and improve funnel conversion
  • Continuously optimise budgets, targeting, and creatives to improve performance
  • Analyse campaign performance and identify growth opportunities

Work closely with content/design teams to improve ad effectiveness

Apna Transforming Careers Through Technology

Since 2019, apna has connected over 60 million jobseekers with more than 250,000 enterprises and small businesses across India. Founded by Nirmit Parikh, a Stanford graduate and serial entrepreneur who recognized the challenges in entry-level hiring, apna has rapidly grown to become India's fastest unicorn in 2021—achieving this milestone in just 21 months.

Backed by marquee global investors - Insight Partners, Tiger Global, Lightspeed India, Sequoia Capital, and GSV, we're revolutionizing livelihood creation across India.

apna advantage - Education with Guaranteed Outcomes We're expanding beyond job matching with our new EdTech vertical that delivers:

1. Premium Online Education: Partnerships with top-tier universities offering UGC-accredited undergraduate and postgraduate programs

2. Career Success Ecosystem: Leveraging our network of 700,000+ recruiters to provide real job interviews

3. Personalized Career Journeys: Dedicated career facilitators, AI-powered job preparation tools, and guaranteed interviews

Why Join Our Mission

● Massive Market Potential: Over 3-4L students pursue online degrees annually in India and this is growing 50% every year

● Consumer Impact Legacy: Build a consumer-facing business that transforms lives

● Exponential Growth Trajectory: Early-stage opportunity in a rapidly expanding market

● Competitive Advantage: Our platform makes degree programs with job guarantees uniquely sellable

● Elite Team Environment: Collaborate with experts across product, operations, and engineering

● Wealth Creation Potential: Join during our early high-growth phase

● Meaningful Impact of work: Deliver genuine value by connecting education directly to career outcomes.

  • 2–3 years experience in performance marketing
  • B2C experience preferred
  • Prior EdTech experience (higher-ed or scaled consumer product) preferred
  • Strong analytical and execution mindset

items.title: Marketing & Business Operations Analyst
items.description:
About BestEx Research
BestEx Research is an award-winning financial technology and research firm specializing in building sophisticated execution algorithms and transaction cost modeling tools servicing multiple asset classes. The firm provides its services to performance-demanding hedge funds, CTAs, asset managers, and banks through a traditional electronic broker and in a broker-neutral Software as a Service (SaaS) model.

BestEx Research’s mission is to become the leader in automation and measurement of execution across asset classes globally and significantly reduce transaction costs for our clients.
Its cloud-based platform, Algo Management System (AMS), is the first end-to-end algorithmic trading solution for equities, futures, and foreign exchange that delivers an entire ecosystem around execution algorithms, including transaction cost analysis (TCA), an algo customization tool called Strategy Studio, a trading dashboard, and pre-trade analytics in a single platform. The platform is currently live for US equity and global futures trading.

BestEx Research is challenging the status quo of stale, black-box solutions from execution providers in a $100 billion industry and offering next-generation execution algorithms that combine performance improvement with transparency and customization. BestEx Research uses leading-edge technology to support its low-latency, highly scalable research, and trading systems with its back end in C++, research libraries in C++/Python and R, and web-based technologies for delivering its front-end platforms.
Visit bestexresearch.com for more information about our mission, products, research, and services.

What you will do
As a Business & Marketing Operations Analyst, you will support the execution and measurement of marketing and business operations activities at a growing firm. This role will work closely with marketing and sales teams to manage and maintain data within HubSpot, including contact records, pipelines, dashboards, and performance reporting, ensuring accuracy across contact lifecycles and campaigns. You will support the execution and tracking of marketing campaigns, including email programs and social media operations, and contribute to campaign measurement, reporting, and operational follow-ups. You will translate performance data into clear, actionable insights for internal stakeholders.

In this role, you will help standardize and improve marketing and reporting workflows, identifying opportunities to automate repetitive processes using available tools and AI-enabled solutions. You will also support website and digital marketing operations, including content updates, basic SEO tracking, and website performance analysis using Google Analytics. Beyond day-to-day execution, you will work closely with marketing and sales teams to improve operational discipline, reporting consistency, and data-driven decision-making.

Who we are looking for
A person who is a good fit for this role is organized, comfortable working with data and systems, and able to collaborate with marketing and sales teams in a B2B environment. This person should have strong written and verbal communication skills and be able to work effectively with internal stakeholders and external vendors when needed. Attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple priorities are essential.

This person is willing to take initiative to investigate issues, maintain operational discipline, and improve existing processes. The learning curve will be meaningful, and the individual in this role will have a direct impact on how marketing and business operations are executed and measured as the firm continues to grow.

Education

  • MBA or PGDBM in Marketing
  • Undergraduate degree in Finance, Economics, or a related quantitative field

Experience & Background

  •  Minimum of three years of relevant experience in marketing operations, business operations, or a similar analytical role
  •  Prior experience working closely with marketing and sales teams in a B2B environment is preferred

CRM & Revenue Operations (HubSpot)

  •  Hands-on experience with HubSpot, including sales database management and contact lifecycle maintenance
  •  Ability to build, maintain, and interpret dashboards and KPI reports for marketing and sales performance
  •  Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reporting integrity across pipelines and campaigns

Marketing Operations

  •  Support execution and performance tracking of email marketing campaigns
  •  Manage social media operations, including scheduling, coordination, and basic performance analytics
  •  Assist in campaign development, measurement, reporting, and operational follow-ups

Process Automation & AI Enablement

  •  Identify opportunities to automate repetitive marketing and reporting workflows
  •  Experience using AI and automation tools to improve efficiency in campaign execution, reporting, and internal processes
  •  Work with stakeholders to document, standardize, and improve operational workflows

Website & Digital Marketing Support

  •  Support website content updates and ongoing maintenance
  •  Experience with Webflow is a strong plus
  •  Working knowledge of SEO fundamentals, including on-page basics and keyword tracking
  •  Experience with Google Analytics for website traffic and performance analysis

General Skills

  •  Strong communication skills
  •  High attention to detail and comfort working with data, systems, and dashboards
  •  Ability to translate operational data into clear, actionable insights
  •  Organized and able to manage multiple projects concurrently
  •  Deep understanding of marketing, including social media and related analytics
  •  Ability to write clear, concise communications and develop persuasive arguments with brevity
  •  Comfort with technical writing, grammar, and attention to detail
  •  Ability to support light design work, including document formatting and basic social media graphics
  •  Comfort using, or ability to learn, marketing tools such as HubSpot, Microsoft Excel, and social media analytics platforms
  •  Experience in the fintech industry is preferred, an interest in fintech is required

items.title: Performance Marketer
items.description:
About Fam (previously FamPay)

Fam is India's first payments app for everyone above 11. FamApp helps make online and offline payments through UPI and FamCard. We are on a mission to raise a new, financially aware generation, and drive 250 million+ youngest users in India to kickstart their financial journey super early in their life.Founded in 2019 by IIT Roorkee alumni, Fam is backed by some of the most respected investors around the world like Elevation Capital, Y-Combinator, Peak XV (Sequoia Capital) India, Venture Highway, Global Founder’s Capital and the likes of Kunal Shah, Amrish Rao as angel investors.
 
Role Overview

We’re looking for a Performance Marketer to build and scale Fam’s paid acquisition engine.

This is a 1→10 role — you’ll own end-to-end growth across Google and Meta, drive high-quality user acquisition at scale, and turn performance marketing into a predictable, efficient growth lever.

This role sits at the intersection of growth, product, and analytics — requiring sharp execution, strong attribution thinking, and a deep understanding of user funnels.

Must-haves
 • 3–5 yrs in performance marketing 
  • Strong experience in B2C/ product based companies
  • Hands-on: Google Ads + Meta Ads
  • Strong MMP experience 
  • Solid understanding of attribution, funnel metrics, incrementality
  • Proven ability to scale installs with controlled CAC
  • Strong analytical + experimentation skills
  • High ownership; executes fast 
  • Has AI native mindset

Good to haves
• Gen Z audience understanding
 • Experience operating at scale — large budgets, high velocity experiments, consistent growth
 • Basic creative strategy understanding

Roles and Responsibilities

1. Paid Acquisition (Own)
  • Own and scale Google + Meta for user acquisition
  • Manage large budgets with focus on CAC and quality installs
  • Continuously optimize campaigns

2. Attribution & Measurement (Own)
  • Own MMP setup, tracking, and attribution accuracy
  • Track performance across channels and resolve overlaps
  • Build and monitor core metrics: CAC, CPI, activation rate, LTV

3. Funnel Optimization (Own)
  • Improve install → KYC → activation → transaction funnel
  • Identify drop-offs and work with product to fix them
  • Optimize for downstream metrics, not just installs

4. Experimentation (Own)
  • Run high-velocity A/B tests across audiences, creatives, and bidding
  • Test new channels and scale what works
  • Drive a strong experimentation culture with clear learnings

5. Creative Iteration (Drive)
  • Work with design/content to build high-performing ad creatives
  • Identify winning hooks for Gen Z (formats, messaging, trends)
  • Rapidly iterate based on performance data

6. Growth & Efficiency (Own)
  • Balance scale vs efficiency (CAC, LTV, payback)
  • Improve channel ROI and reduce dependency on any single platform
  • Identify new scalable acquisition opportunities

Why Join Us
  • Opportunity to build a category-defining brand for the next generation in India
  • Work directly with founders and leadership
  • Own a high-impact growth lever from day one
  • Fast-paced, high-ownership culture

items.title: Assistant Manager - Marketing (Brand Integration), Telugu
items.description:
Job Summary:
 
We serve high quality content to millions of customers across millions of devices, all of which are constantly evolving and changing. The incumbent is responsible for creating and executing best practices in brand integrations in collaboration with various teams. This position is a revenue generation role and is responsible for solving clients’ brand-related problem statements through content led integrations.
 
About the team:
 
The Brand Solutions team is responsible for driving client engagement and creating and executing best practices in brand integrations for JHS and Star Maa channels across multiple platforms. The team works on client briefs for fiction, non-fiction, and event integrations, ensuring seamless execution. They collaborate closely with the Programming, PRS, Creative Communications, and Marketing teams to maintain consistent messaging and maximize reach. With a strong focus on regional markets and audience preferences, the team ensures targeted execution of integrations as per the agreed scripts, enhancing the channel’s visibility. Their efforts strengthen brand presence and foster audience loyalty in a competitive market.
Job Summary:
 
We serve high quality content to millions of customers across millions of devices, all of which are constantly evolving and changing. The incumbent is responsible for creating and executing best practices in brand integrations in collaboration with various teams. This position is a revenue generation role and is responsible for solving clients’ brand-related problem statements through content led integrations.
 
About the team:
 
The Brand Solutions team is responsible for driving client engagement and creating and executing best practices in brand integrations for JHS and Star Maa channels across multiple platforms. The team works on client briefs for fiction, non-fiction, and event integrations, ensuring seamless execution. They collaborate closely with the Programming, PRS, Creative Communications, and Marketing teams to maintain consistent messaging and maximize reach. With a strong focus on regional markets and audience preferences, the team ensures targeted execution of integrations as per the agreed scripts, enhancing the channel’s visibility. Their efforts strengthen brand presence and foster audience loyalty in a competitive market.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Work on client briefs across fiction, non-fiction, and event integrations
  • Develop integration ideas and concepts aligned to client objectives in collaboration with internal content teams
  • Support scripting of integrations for client approvals in coordination with copywriters
  • Ensure on-ground and on-air execution of integrations as per approved concepts/scripts
  • Work on on-air special initiatives to enhance brand visibility and storytelling
  • Act as a single point of contact (SPOC) for client requirements and queries via PRS
  • Create client-facing presentations (PPTs) including pitch decks, integration concepts, and post-campaign summaries
  • Coordinate with internal teams (sales, content, production, marketing) to ensure smooth execution and timelines
  • Support in post-evaluation reports by compiling data, learnings, and key highlights for clients.

Skills & Attributes for success:

  • Experience with consumers facing company with national presence is essential
  • Analytical skills would be strong
  • Technically savvy, with very good communication (written, verbal and email etiquette)
  • Passionate person with an ability to build capacity and scale up the operations quickly
  • Carries a dream to create a new entity from scratch
  • Ability to lead an environment of constant change
  • Ability to stay connected to bigger purpose along with high transactional routine tasks
  • Ability to express and perform under pressure is essential
  • Demonstrates high degree of creativity and unusual common sense

Preferred Education & Experience:

  • Minimum Qualification: MBA or graduate with 3-5 years’ work experience in a related role.
  • 2–3 years of experience in relevant filed preferably within television or entertainment.
  • Developing best practices in brand integration
  • Piece to camera vignettes from scripting to execution, co-ordination and delivering the end output.
About Us:
 
Perched firmly at the nucleus of spellbinding content and innovative technology, JioStar is a leading global media & entertainment company that is reimagining the way audiences consume entertainment and sports. Its television network and streaming service together reach more than 750 million viewers every week, igniting the dreams and aspirations of hundreds of million people across geographies.

items.title: Business Analyst
items.description:
Business Analyst

About Inizio Ignite:

Inizio Ignite is the global advisory partner for health and life sciences, encompassing connected expertise across Research Partnership, Putnam, Vynamic, and STEM. Guided by purpose, passion, and precision, we collaborate with clients to ignite impact, accelerate performance, and deliver lasting change for patients. By uniting strategy, insights, and innovation with a unique depth and breadth of expertise, we drive transformation and shape the future of health.

Inizio Ignite, STEM

Inizio Ignite is the global advisory partner for health and life sciences, encompassing connected expertise across Research Partnership, Putnam, Vynamic, and STEM. Guided by purpose, passion, and precision, we collaborate with clients to ignite impact, accelerate performance, and deliver lasting change for patients. By uniting strategy, insights, and innovation with a unique depth and breadth of expertise, we drive transformation and shape the future of health. Our STEM team uses benchmarking through AI-enabled and evidence-based approaches to drive alignment resulting in accelerated performance. Serving clients across brand & commercial, Medical Affairs & sales, our expertise includes data, research & insights (proprietary benchmarking data), strategic brand alignment, and sales & MSL performance benchmarking. Proudly part of Inizio – the market-leading commercialization partner for health and life sciences. From early-stage development to loss of exclusivity, we simplify complexity, unlock value, and make collaboration seamless at every pivotal moment – supporting confident, insight-driven decisions that move innovation forward. 

Job purpose: 

We are looking for a highly analytical and data-driven professional to join us in the business analysis team. This role will help you to develop a solid understanding of the pharmaceutical industry, strong quantitative and qualitative analytical skills, and to gain a unique insight into best practices across the industry.

As a member of the analysis team, you will have great visibility and exposure to senior directors in the company and the opportunity to take on a high level of responsibility for project delivery early-on in your career. You will be supported by an experienced analyst team through your development and training and be expected to collaborate and offer new insight within a close-knit team environment.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Managing multiple LIVE projects and their timelines to meet both internal and client deadlines.
  • Collaborating with Project leaders/Lead Analysts to interpret data and formulate action plans and recommendations for clients.
  • Analyzing data from multi-sources using quantitative and qualitative methods to derive
  • Pressure testing data and identifying areas for investigation and training.
  • Perform detailed quality checks of deliverables (survey links, dashboards, Excel/Power Point outputs) before sending them to stakeholders
  • Develop interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI to support client decision-making
  • Use Python (where applicable) for data manipulation, automation, and basic analysis (e.g., Pandas, data cleaning)
  • Building and maintaining MS Excel databases from source data.
  • Produce high quality presentations and other deliverables for clients using PowerPoint.
  • Supporting members in the analysis team to meet client deadlines and drive development and efficiencies within the team both locally and on international projects. 
  • Identify opportunities to improve processes, automate workflows, and enhance efficiency

Essential Requirements:

  • The ideal candidate must have a Science/Analytics based degree in subjects with numerical emphasis (such as Chemistry, Physics, Mathematics, Biotechnology, Engineering, etc.)
  • 2–3 years of experience in business analysis, data analysis, or a similar role (pharma/healthcare preferred but not mandatory)
  • Strong communication and multi-tasking skills to handle multiple projects with different stakeholders.
  • Advanced Level experience in using Excel (pivots, macros, formulas, etc.) and PowerPoint (slide designing, aesthetics, etc.).
  • Ability to build Power BI dashboards, create data models, and use DAX for calculations
  • Ability to write SQL queries for data extraction, joins, filtering, and basic transformations
  • Python with experience in data manipulation (e.g., Pandas), data cleaning, and scripting/automation
  • Proactiveness in flagging issues, identifying improvement areas and taking initiative to discuss and align with leadership
  • Ability to understand the business ask and vision.
  • Proactive individuals with drive and ambition, a strong work ethic to grow in a dynamic environment with good opportunities to help develop and further the business.

 

Don't meet every job requirement? That's okay! Our company is dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive, and authentic workplace. If you're excited about this role, but your experience doesn't perfectly fit every qualification, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right person for this role or others.

items.title: Manager - Content Marketing, Colors
items.description:
This role sits within the Colors marketing team, responsible for designing and delivering high-impact launch and sustenance campaigns driven by strong consumer insights, creative excellence, and media effectiveness.

This role sits within the Colors marketing team, responsible for designing and delivering high-impact launch and sustenance campaigns driven by strong consumer insights, creative excellence, and media effectiveness.

Roles and Responsibilities

    Show Launch & Campaign Execution: Plan and execute end-to-end launch and sustenance campaigns across TV, print, OOH, on-ground. Develop creative briefs, KVs, messaging frameworks, and campaign innovations aligned to consumer insights. Drive timely execution of promos, creatives, internal branding, and campaign rollouts.

    Consumer Insight & Performance Orientation: Translate consumer behavior, cultural insights, and research findings into sharp marketing strategies. Track performance closely and conduct post-launch evaluations to identify learnings and optimisation opportunities. Proactively flag growth opportunities and red-flag issues for assigned shows.

    Sustenance & Portfolio Management: Lead proactive sustenance planning to maintain slot health, audience engagement, and show visibility. Ensure regular creative refreshes, platform visibility, and integrated solutions across the Colors ecosystem.

    Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams including Digital, OAP, Graphics, Content, Traffic, Presentation, Sales, and Distribution. Coordinate with external creative, media, production, and research agencies for seamless execution.

    Innovation & AI Usage: Leverage AI tools to optimise pitch development, creative ideation, copywriting, GTM decks, and presentations. Drive efficiency, speed, and quality improvements through smart use of technology.

Skills and Attributes

    • Strong consumer-first thinking with ability to convert insights into effective marketing plans
    • Experience working on 360-degree marketing campaigns (TV, Digital, Print, OOH, PR)
    • High creative sensibility with strong execution rigour
    • Interest and understanding of Hindi GEC and audience behavior
    • Working knowledge of digital and social media marketing
    • Basic understanding of TV viewership metrics (GRPs, Reach, TSV)

Education & Experience

    • Bachelor’s / Master’s degree in Marketing or related discipline
    • 5–8 years of experience in Marketing / Brand / Communications / Advertising / Media

The role involves managing marketing campaigns for Malayalam OTT & TV, including marketing and media promotions, including ATL and BTL executions. Also collaborating with the marketing team to create revenue-generating content strategies. Experience in Brand solutions/ integrations role will be an added advantage.

The team creates and executes marketing plans, such as campaigns for show launches, brand partnerships, and audience reach. They collaborate closely with the programming, creative communications, and digital marketing teams to ensure consistent messaging and maximize reach. With a focus on regional markets and audience preferences, the team creates targeted promotions, media planning with ATL and marketing activation with BTL driving micro-marketing and on-ground activation, and digital strategies that enhance the channel's visibility. items.title: Business Analyst
items.description:
WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. 

We unite cutting-edge media intelligence and data solutions, world-class creativity, next-generation production, transformative enterprise solutions and expert strategic counsel in a single company – powered by exceptional talent and our agentic marketing platform, WPP Open, to help our clients navigate change, capture opportunity and deliver transformational growth. 
 
We have been building the world's most valuable brands for 50 years and have global reach across 100+ markets, with deep local expertise.
 
Our people are the key to our success. We're committed to fostering a culture of creativity, belonging and continuous learning, attracting and developing the brightest talent, and providing exciting career opportunities that help our people grow. 
 
For more information, visit WPP.com.
 

Why we're hiring:

At WPP, technology is at the heart of everything we do, and it is WPP IT’s mission to enable everyone to collaborate, create and thrive. WPP IT is undergoing a significant transformation to modernise ways of working, shift to cloud and micro-service-based architectures, drive automation, digitise colleague and client experiences and deliver insight from WPP’s petabytes of data. 

 WPP Media is the world’s leading media investment company responsible for more than $63B in annual media investment through agencies Mindshare, MediaCom, Wavemaker, Essence and m/SIX, as well as the outcomes-driven programmatic audience company, Xaxis and data and technology company Choreograph. WPP Medias portfolio includes Data & Technology, Investment and Services, all united in a vision to shape the next era of media where advertising works better for people. By leveraging all the benefits of scale, the company innovates, differentiates and generates sustained value for our clients wherever they do business. 

 

What you'll be doing:

Primary Responsibilities: 

  • Gather, analyze, and document business and technical requirements in collaboration with the MDM Lead and key stakeholders 
  • Support the breakdown of high-level requirements into detailed functional and technical requirements 
  • Review and analyze the existing gap analysis and help translate identified gaps into prioritized user stories and backlog items 
  • Help prioritize requirements by identifying quick wins, dependencies, and delivery complexity 
  • Translate agreed requirements into user stories, acceptance criteria, and backlog items for development teams 
  • Support delivery activities by participating in backlog refinement, sprint planning, and requirement clarifications 

Additional Responsibilities: 

  • Maintain requirement documentation and traceability as inputs evolve 
  • Support the MDM Lead with documentation, analysis, and follow-ups across workstreams 
  • Help ensure alignment between documented requirements and delivered functionality 

What you'll need:

Required Skills: 

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Information Systems, Computer Science, or related field 
  • 5+ years of experience as a Business Analyst or Technical Business Analyst on data or platform initiatives 
  • Proven experience gathering requirements through workshops, interviews, and documentation reviews 
  • Ability to translate business needs into clear, structured requirements and user stories 
  • Solid understanding of data concepts such as master data, reference data, data quality, and integrations 
  • Strong analytical, organizational, and documentation skills 
  • Experience working in cross-functional, global teams 
  • Strong English communication skills (verbal and written) 

Preferred Skills: 

  • Exposure to Master Data Management (MDM) or enterprise data platforms 
  • Familiarity with Agile delivery methodologies and tools (e.g. Jira, Confluence, Azure DevOps) 
  • Basic understanding of APIs, data ingestion patterns, and outbound data consumption 
  • Experience working alongside solution architects and development teams 
  • Exposure to cloud data platforms such as BigQuery, Azure SQL, Databricks, or similar 
  • Experience in a product-based or platform-led environment 

Who you are:

You're open: We are inclusive and collaborative; we encourage the free exchange of ideas; we respect and celebrate diverse views. We are open-minded: to new ideas, new partnerships, new ways of working.

You're optimistic: We believe in the power of creativity, technology and talent to create brighter futures or our people, our clients and our communities. We approach all that we do with conviction: to try the new and to seek the unexpected.

You're extraordinary: we are stronger together: through collaboration we achieve the amazing. We are creative leaders and pioneers of our industry; we provide extraordinary every day.

 

What we'll give you:

Passionate, inspired people – We aim to create a culture in which people can do extraordinary work.

Scale and opportunity – We offer the opportunity to create, influence and complete projects at a scale that is unparalleled in the industry.

Challenging and stimulating work – Unique work and the opportunity to join a group of creative problem solvers. Are you up for the challenge?

#LI-Hybrid 

We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.

WPP is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.

Please read our Privacy Notice (https://www.wpp.com/en/careers/wpp-privacy-policy-for-recruitment) for more information on how we process the information you provide.

items.title: Performance Marketing Executive (Growth & Operations)
items.description:
At Trackier, we’re building SaaS (software as a service) products that are used in more than 20+ countries across the world. Over the last 9 years, Trackier has helped create industry standards in Performance Marketing and Mobile Marketing products and have helped brands grow their website conversions through partners by our suite of products across Performance, eCommerce, Mobile.

Trackier is Customisable Performance Marketing Software used by Ad Networks, Agencies and Advertisers to manage publisher relations. The Trackier Performance Marketing Platform enables you to create, automate, measure, and optimize all of your marketing Campaigns, Publishers, and advertisers, creatives and conversions in one place.

Role

We’re looking for someone who’s excited to learn, experiment, and grow across multiple facets of marketing and business operations. This role offers hands-on exposure to performance marketing, CRM analytics, and partner collaborations, giving you a holistic understanding of how growth really works in a SaaS setup. 

You’ll get the opportunity to work across the entire marketing funnel - from acquisition to conversion and beyond, owning and understanding each stage along the way. If you’re curious, proactive, and keen to build both analytical and execution skills in a fast-paced environment, you’ll find this role both challenging and rewarding.

Key Responsibilities

Performance Marketing

  • Assist in planning, executing, and optimizing campaigns across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, and other similar platforms
  • Monitor performance metrics and identify opportunities to improve efficiency and ROI
  • Support A/B testing for creatives, audiences, and landing pages
  • Coordinate with content/design teams to improve campaign output

CRM & Data Analytics

  • Work with lead management and prospecting software to derive actionable insights
  • Track user journeys across the funnel from lead to conversion
  • Analyze campaign and CRM data to identify patterns, gaps, and opportunities

Growth & Operations

  • Reach out to potential partners for integrations with our SaaS platform
  • Initiate conversations and set up calls/demos with relevant stakeholders
  • Support and coordinate co-marketing activities with partners within our ecosystem
  • Maintain organized records of outreach and partner pipelines

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Technology, or related fields
  • 1-2 years of experience in performance marketing or related domain
  • Understanding of digital advertising platforms (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, etc.)
  • Exposure to martech platforms like HubSpot and Salesforce is a plus
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills
  • An edge in leveraging AI tools for research, analysis, campaign optimization, or workflow efficiency is essential

What We’re Looking For

  • Curiosity to learn fast and go beyond assigned responsibilities
  • Comfort with ambiguity and a bias toward action
  • Ability to balance marketing, data, and operational tasks
  • A proactive approach to problem-solving and execution
  • Comprehensive medical insurance coverage
  • 5-day working culture
  • Competitive, industry-leading salary structure
  • Lucrative reimbursement policy

items.title: Performance Marketing: Associate Director/Director
items.description:
Position Summary

We are looking for you - The, Performance Marketing Director has ultimate accountability for the effectiveness of the entire Performance Marketing team. As a performance media expert, this person will have expertise in an array of addressable paid advertising strategies that utilizes tech based buying and optimization tools to positively affect our client’s ROI including search, display, social, mobile, local, Ecom and video. This role will have an increasing focus on Demand Generation and Response Management as our clients look to monetize online. This person should also understand the interplay and synergy between traditional and digital media and have the ability to build and scale an integrated team of performance practitioners.

 

The Director is responsible for leading the Execution teams of a large enterprise client’s performance marketing accounts towards stated client and company objectives. The Director will manage and direct Performance Media teams, including Group Heads, Operations Supervisors, Senior Manager, Manager and Executives. Proven account management and team leadership experience is essential, along with experience in online marketing and digital media.

 

Account Management

  • Develops, manages, and monitors client service delivery executions of the assigned accounts
  • Oversees process development and execution management
  • Assures quality control of all media planning and implementation
  • Enforces Best Practices
  • Prepares and presents annual financial plans and human resources plans

 

Performance Media

  • Implements Planning Process for the assigned accounts and holistic media planning across all digital disciplines paid search, display, social, native, video and Ecom
  • Coordinates efforts across different digital media channels to drive optimized recommendations
  • Continuously evaluate and improve upon all digital media opportunities
  • Attend to client meetings as needed, interface as needed with executive level and middle management level on client side during meetings and presentations
  • Participates in building and evolving the PM practice, vision and areas of expertise
  • Understands and expands business prospects by having a thorough understanding of all the services provided by the agency.

 

Team Leadership & Development

  • Embraces and encourages a culture based on team work, collaboration, and intellectual curiosity
  • Motivates, leads, and manages internal teams, working collaboratively to drive programs that meet our clients’ performance and business objectives
  • Drives adoption of stated account management best practices through example setting, positive reinforcement and behavioural correction
  • Assists in interviewing, hiring, training, mentoring, developing, and evaluating team members
  • Conducts performance reviews and career path plans for direct reports
  • Provide training in cross media planning to their direct reports and bellow teams

Skills

  • Ability to forecast expected outcomes of Brand and ROI campaigns and manage spend accordingly
  • Proven expertise with relevant platform tools (DoubleClick Bid Manager, Google AdWords tools, Facebook tools etc.), Media Research Tools (ComScore, GWI, TGI etc.)
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills
  • Strong organizational skills, detail-oriented and capable of multi-tasking
  • Superb client relationship and management skills
  • Proven problem solving skills and ability to think outside of the box
  • Detail oriented and responsive, deadline-driven with strong quantitative reasoning skills
  • Provide timely and actionable feedback to the team to aid in their development and improvement

 

Qualifications

Education:

  • Graduate/ Post Graduate Degree or related work experience
  • Concentration in Marketing, Finance, Digital Media, Accounting, or related field preferred
  • Google and Facebook Blueprint Certified Professional
  • Extreme attention to detail with the ability to prioritize and execute in a fast-paced environment

 

What You Can Expect From Interactive Avenues

Interactive Avenue’s  vision is to make advertising more insightful to the brands. We do this by employing the world’s very best talent to solve some of the toughest challenges of today’s digital marketing landscape. It’s important that we hire people whose values reflect those of our own: genuine, results-focused, daring and insightful. As an Interactive Avenues employee, we promise you a workplace that invests in your career, cares for you and is fun and engaging. We believe these factors create a workplace where you can be yourself and do amazing work.

items.title: Lead - Content Marketing
items.description:
InMobi Advertising is a global technology leader helping marketers win the moments that matter. Our advertising platform reaches over 2 billion people across 150+ countries and turns real-time context into business outcomes, delivering results grounded in privacy-first principles. Trusted by 30,000+ brands and leading publishers, InMobi is where intelligence, creativity, and accountability converge. By combining lock screens, apps, TVs, and the open web with AI and machine learning, we deliver receptive attention, precise personalization, and measurable impact.

Through Glance AI, we are shaping AI Commerce, reimagining the future of e-commerce with inspiration-led discovery and shopping. Designed to seamlessly integrate into everyday consumer technology, Glance AI transforms every screen into a gateway for instant, personal, and joyful discovery.  Spanning diverse categories such as fashion, beauty, travel, accessories, home décor, pets, and beyond, Glance AI delivers deeply personalized shopping experiences. With rich first-party data and unparalleled consumer access, it harnesses InMobi’s global scale, insights, and targeting capabilities to create high impact, performance driven shopping journeys for brands worldwide.

Recognized as a Great Place to Work, and by MIT Technology Review, Fast Company’s Top 10 Innovators, and more, InMobi is a workplace where bold ideas create global impact. Backed by investors including SoftBank, Kleiner Perkins, and Sherpalo Ventures, InMobi has offices across San Mateo, New York, London, Singapore, Tokyo, Seoul, Jakarta, Bengaluru and beyond.

At InMobi Advertising, you’ll have the opportunity to shape how billions of users connect with content, commerce, and brands worldwide. To learn more, visit www.inmobi.com

InMobi Advertising is a global technology leader helping marketers win the moments that matter. Our advertising platform reaches over 2 billion people across 150+ countries and turns real-time context into business outcomes, delivering results grounded in privacy-first principles. Trusted by 30,000+ brands and leading publishers, InMobi is where intelligence, creativity, and accountability converge. By combining lock screens, apps, TVs, and the open web with AI and machine learning, we deliver receptive attention, precise personalization, and measurable impact.

Through Glance AI, we are shaping AI Commerce, reimagining the future of e-commerce with inspiration-led discovery and shopping. Designed to seamlessly integrate into everyday consumer technology, Glance AI transforms every screen into a gateway for instant, personal, and joyful discovery.  Spanning diverse categories such as fashion, beauty, travel, accessories, home décor, pets, and beyond, Glance AI delivers deeply personalized shopping experiences. With rich first-party data and unparalleled consumer access, it harnesses InMobi’s global scale, insights, and targeting capabilities to create high impact, performance driven shopping journeys for brands worldwide.

Recognized as a Great Place to Work, and by MIT Technology Review, Fast Company’s Top 10 Innovators, and more, InMobi is a workplace where bold ideas create global impact. Backed by investors including SoftBank, Kleiner Perkins, and Sherpalo Ventures, InMobi has offices across San Mateo, New York, London, Singapore, Tokyo, Seoul, Jakarta, Bengaluru and beyond.

At InMobi Advertising, you’ll have the opportunity to shape how billions of users connect with content, commerce, and brands worldwide. To learn more, visit www.inmobi.com

Who are we and What do we do?

InMobi Group’s mission is to power intelligent, mobile-first experiences for enterprises and consumers. Its businesses across advertising, marketing, data and content platforms are shaping consumer experience in a world of connected devices. InMobi Group has been recognized on both the 2018 and 2019 CNBC Disruptor 50 list and as one of Fast Company’s 2018 World’s Most Innovative Companies.

What’s the InMobi family like?

Consistently featured among the “Great Places to Work” in India since 2017, our culture is our true north, enabling us to think big, solve complex challenges and grow with new opportunities. InMobians are passionate and driven, creative and fun-loving, take ownership and are results-focused. We invite you to free yourself, dream big and chase your passion.

What do we promise?

We offer an opportunity to have an immediate impact on the company and our products. The work that you shall do will be mission critical for InMobi and will be critical for optimizing tech operations, working with highly capable and ambitious peer groups. At InMobi, you get food for your body, soul, and mind with daily meals, gym, and yoga classes, cutting-edge training and tools, cocktails at drink cart Thursdays and fun at work on Funky Fridays. We even promise to let you bring your kids and pets to work.

What will you be doing?

Striking a perfect balance between creativity and analytical thinking, the content marketing team for APAC ensures to bring forth InMobi’s voice to advertisers and marketers in the region with thoughtful marketing campaigns. The team works with other units for planning and strategy, design and video production, and digital marketing.

What We’re Looking For

  • A bachelor’s degree in Business, Journalism, English, Communications, or any related field 
  • 3-5 years' experience writing B2B2C marketing content with knowledge of advertising, branding, and ad tech. Should be able to think with a consumer-out approach. Please note that if you have fewer years of experience and match the skillset, we would still be happy to hear from you.
  • Must be skilled in long-form and short-form content creation that is derived from and supported by a strong SEO/SEM optimization and PPC strategy
  • Ability to consider multiple sources of input for development and refinement of content (including AI tools); comfortable taking constructive input and using it to iterate and improve the finished product
  • Track record of clear, successful communications on complex topics (portfolio required)
  • Excellent writing, editing, and research skills

Additional Skills We Would Love to Have 

  • Great presentation skills with a flair for narration and storytelling
  • Strong research and analytical skills 

Roles and Responsibilities

  • Communicate product messaging through pointed, accurate, and compelling content across blogs, case studies, web pages, emails, ads, reports, search descriptions, and other collateral
  • Lead content projects for events and reports end-to-end
  • Implement SEO best practices to drive organic traffic to the brand
  • Conduct research to understand and stay abreast of industry trends
  • Stay up-to-date on latest content writing and marketing trends
  • Develop product knowledge and understand the nuances of communicating for a fast-growing technology brand
  • Repurpose content into multiple assets for various channels to maximize reach
  • Monitor performance and consistently improvise on existing formats and channels
  • Propose, implement, or lead improvements in the content marketing strategy, plan, and process
  • Take complete ownership and collaborate with multiple teams such as sales, client services/solutions, design, digital, and product marketing

This Role is Perfect for You If

  • You are a great listener, and you have a knack for asking the right questions to frame the right story.
  • You are optimistic, easy to work with, and good at setting the right expectations and boundaries.
  • You are good at prioritizing, planning, and taking ownership of tasks.
  • You have experience working on essential content and AI tools.
  • You have written high-performing blogs, articles, or ads previously. 
  • You love storytelling, words are how you frame your thoughts, and you are obsessed with punctuation and grammar.
  • You have a knack to deliver compelling stories, build relevant narratives, and drive real connections with content.

    Since 2007, InMobi has built the extraordinary. Beyond just technology. It has built a way of working. 

    Across 16 offices globally, through every pivot and breakthrough, one thing has remained constant: we are Builders, Dreamers, Doers. We are fluid enough to move fast, grounded enough to own outcomes, and human enough to care deeply about the work and about one another.

    Culture is at the core of that ethos. It has been co-created by the people who built this company and by those continuing to shape it every day. It lives in how we work, how decisions are made, how teams show up for one another, and how seriously we take the responsibility to build the best.

    This is a place where ambition and belonging occupy the same space. Where the bar is high and the support is real. Where freedom comes with trust, and trust comes with accountability. Where you are valued not only for what you do, but for the perspective, judgment, and humanity you bring to the work. Where you will be challenged by the work and supported by the communities, passions and experiences that shape who you are beyond your role.

     When people show up fully, we do more than build meaningful work. We build something extraordinary together.

     If this sounds like the place you have been looking for, join us. 

     Find out more here: InMobi Culture


The InMobi Culture

At InMobi, culture isn’t a buzzword; it's an ethos woven by every InMobian, reflecting our diverse backgrounds and experiences.

We thrive on challenges and seize every opportunity for growth. Our core values — thinking big, being passionate, showing accountability, and taking ownership with freedom — guide us in every decision we make.

We believe in nurturing and investing in your development through continuous learning and career progression with our InMobi Live Your Potential program.

InMobi is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer and is committed to providing reasonable accommodations to qualified individuals with disabilities throughout the hiring process and in the workplace.

Visit https://www.inmobi.com/company/careers to better understand our benefits, values, and more!

items.title: business analyst
items.description:
what is CRED?

 

CRED is an exclusive community for India’s most trustworthy and creditworthy individuals, where the members are rewarded for good financial behavior. CRED was born out of a need to bring back the focus on a long lost virtue, one of trust, the idea being to create a community centered around this virtue. a community that constantly strives to become more virtuous in this regard till they finally scale their behavior to create a utopia where being trustworthy is the norm and not the exception. to build a community like this requires a community of its own; a community special in its own way, working towards making this vision come true. 

 

here’s a thought experiment: what do you get when you put a group of incredibly passionate and driven people and entrust them with the complete freedom to chase down their goals in a completely uninhibited manner? answer: you get something close to what we have at CRED; CRED just has it better. 

 

here’s what will be in store for you at CRED once you join as a part of the team:

what is CRED?

 

CRED is an exclusive community for India’s most trustworthy and creditworthy individuals, where the members are rewarded for good financial behavior. CRED was born out of a need to bring back the focus on a long lost virtue, one of trust, the idea being to create a community centered around this virtue. a community that constantly strives to become more virtuous in this regard till they finally scale their behavior to create a utopia where being trustworthy is the norm and not the exception. to build a community like this requires a community of its own; a community special in its own way, working towards making this vision come true. 

 

here’s a thought experiment: what do you get when you put a group of incredibly passionate and driven people and entrust them with the complete freedom to chase down their goals in a completely uninhibited manner? answer: you get something close to what we have at CRED; CRED just has it better. 

 

here’s what will be in store for you at CRED once you join as a part of the team:

what will you do:

  • work on day-to-day analytics problems across business and growth; break down vague questions into structured problems and analyze user behavior, funnels, and campaign performance to drive decisions
  • build and maintain dashboards people trust; ensure metrics are accurate, consistent, and easy to interpret; define and track success metrics for experiments and new initiatives
  • support experiments end-to-end by setting them up, measuring performance, and extracting clear learnings; close the loop between data, insights, and action
  • automate recurring analysis and reduce turnaround time for common asks; build simple templates and contribute to self-serve analytics over time
  • work closely with business, product, and growth teams; communicate insights, assumptions, and limitations clearly, and manage expectations on scope and timelines

you should apply if you:

  • 2–4 years of experience in data, product, or business analytics; strong SQL skills and comfort working with large datasets; also open to freshers with relevant education from Tier-1 / Tier-2 colleges
  • ability to break down business questions into structured analyses with high attention to detail and solid analytical thinking
  • clear communication - can explain insights simply without losing nuance
  • comfortable in fast-paced, high-ownership environments where ambiguity is common
  • familiarity with BI / visualization tools like Tableau or Looker is a plus
  • exposure to digital payments, fintech, or consumer internet products is good to have
  • experience supporting experiments or growth initiatives will help

how is life at CRED?

 

working at CRED would instantly make you realize one thing: you are working with the best talent around you. not just in the role you occupy, but everywhere you go. talk to someone around you; most likely you will be talking to a singer, standup comic, artist, writer, an athlete, maybe a magician. at CRED people always have talent up their sleeves. with the right company, even conversations can be rejuvenating. at CRED, we guarantee a good company.

 

hard truths: pushing oneself comes with the role. and we realise pushing oneself is hard work. which is why CRED is in the continuous process of building an environment that helps the team rejuvenate oneself: included but not limited to a stacked, in-house pantry, with lunch and dinner provided for all the team members, paid sick leaves and a comprehensive health insurance. 

 

to make things smoother and to make sure you spend time and energy only on the most important things, CRED strives to make every process transparent: there are no work timings because we do not believe in archaic methods of calculating productivity, your work should speak for you. there are no job designations because you will be expected to hold down roles that cannot be described in one word. since trust is a major virtue in the community we have built, we make it a point to highlight it in the community behind CRED: all our employees get their salaries before their joining date. a show of trust that speaks volumes because of the skin in the game. 

 

there are many more such eccentricities that make CRED what it is but that’s for one to discover. if you feel at home reading this, get in touch.

items.title: Business Analyst (Salesforce)
items.description:
Our team is seeking a dynamic Senior Salesforce Business Analyst who will work closely with Marketing, Sales, Finance and other stakeholders to define the system roadmap and implement solutions that align with business objectives and foster scalability. The ideal candidate must have a strong understanding of Salesforce platforms, Configure Price Quote system, Agentforce, business processes, and a proven track record of translating business needs into effective technical solutions. The Salesforce Business Analyst will play a key role in bridging the gap between business requirements and Salesforce implementation, ensuring successful project delivery. Growth in the role will require the Sr Salesforce Business Analyst to assess evolving needs, enhance internal and external user experience, and apply skills and insight to propose high-value changes to the processes, policies, and systems.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Lead Salesforce development projects from conceptualization to implementation.
  • Requirements Gathering: Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and objectives. Conduct workshops and interviews to elicit detailed and clear requirements.
  • Documentation: Document and maintain detailed functional specifications, user stories, and process flows. Create and update documentation related to system configurations and customizations. 
  • Salesforce Configuration: Configure and customize Salesforce applications to meet business requirements. Collaborate with developers and administrators to implement solutions.    
  • Data Analysis: Perform data analysis to ensure data integrity and accuracy within Salesforce. Identify data migration needs and collaborate with data migration specialists    
  • Testing and Quality Assurance: Develop and execute test plans, ensuring that solutions meet quality standards. Collaborate with QA teams to perform system testing and user acceptance testing.    
  • User Training and Support: Provide training to end-users on new features and functionalities. Offer ongoing support and troubleshooting assistance.    
  • Report and Dashboard Creation: Design and create reports and dashboards to visualize key performance metrics. Work with stakeholders to understand reporting needs and optimize data visibility.    
  • Collaboration: Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including developers, administrators, product owners/managers, project managers, and business stakeholders, to ensure the CPQ system effectively supports sales operations and drives business growth. 
  • Bachelor's Degree or equivalent experience - Required 
  • 4+ years Proven experience as a Salesforce Business Analyst role -Required    
  • Salesforce Administrator or Business Analyst certifications  - Required    
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills   
  • Knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies.   
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.   
  • Ability to communicate ideas and information clearly, accurately, and tactfully   
  • Solid presentation and facilitation skills   
  • Must be highly organized, able to effectively prioritize work, be oriented to detail, and have excellent follow through   
  • In-depth knowledge of CPQ software platform   
  • Proficient in JIRA, Microsoft Office Suite, advanced Excel knowledge    

Exciting Projects: We focus on industries like High-Tech, communication, media, healthcare, retail and telecom. Our customer list is full of fantastic global brands and leaders who love what we build for them.
Collaborative Environment: You Can expand your skills by collaborating with a diverse team of highly talented people in an open, laidback environment — or even abroad in one of our global center's.
Work-Life Balance: Accellor prioritizes work-life balance, which is why we offer flexible work schedules, opportunities to work from home, and paid time off and holidays.
Professional Development: Our dedicated Learning & Development team regularly organizes Communication skills training, Stress Management program, professional certifications, and technical and soft skill trainings.
Excellent Benefits: We provide our employees with competitive salaries, family medical insurance, Personal Accident Insurance, Periodic health awareness program, extended maternity leave, annual performance bonuses, and referral bonuses.

Disclaimer: -

Accellor is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate in hiring or any employment decision based on race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), marital status, ancestry, physical or mental disability, genetic information, veteran status, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or other applicable legally protected characteristic

items.title: Lead Business Analyst
items.description:
About the Team
 
You’ll be part of the Analytics Team at Meesho. We are trying to revolutionize the way our consumers shop online by experimenting with a video based shopping format.
 
About the Role
 
As a Lead Business Analyst, you will work on improving the reporting tools, methods, and processes of the team you are assigned to. You will also create and deliver weekly, monthly and quarterly metrics critical for tracking and managing the business.  You will manage numerous requests concurrently and strategically, prioritising them when necessary.
 
You will actively engage with internal partners throughout the organisation to meet and exceed customer service levels and transport-related KPIs. You will brainstorm simple, scalable solutions to difficult problems, and seamlessly manage projects under your purview. You will maintain excellent relationships with our users – and in fact, advocate for them – while keeping in mind the business goals of your team. 
About the Team
 
You’ll be part of the Analytics Team at Meesho. We are trying to revolutionize the way our consumers shop online by experimenting with a video based shopping format.
 
About the Role
 
As a Lead Business Analyst, you will work on improving the reporting tools, methods, and processes of the team you are assigned to. You will also create and deliver weekly, monthly and quarterly metrics critical for tracking and managing the business.  You will manage numerous requests concurrently and strategically, prioritising them when necessary.
 
You will actively engage with internal partners throughout the organisation to meet and exceed customer service levels and transport-related KPIs. You will brainstorm simple, scalable solutions to difficult problems, and seamlessly manage projects under your purview. You will maintain excellent relationships with our users – and in fact, advocate for them – while keeping in mind the business goals of your team. 

What you will do

  • Create various algorithms for optimizing demand and supply data
  • Conduct analysis and solution-building based on insights captured from data
  • Give insights to management and help in strategic planning
  • Analyze metrics, key indicators and other available data sources to discover root causes of process defects
  • Support business development and help to create efficient designs and solution processes
  • Determine efficient utilization of resources
  • Research and implement cost reduction opportunities

What you will need

  • B.Tech/M.Tech /MBA in any discipline
  • 4+ years of experience as a Business Analyst
  • Proficiency in Advanced Excel and Advanced SQL (must-have) – Python is Plus
  • Understanding of basic statistics and probability concepts
  • Proven problem-solving skills
About us 

Welcome to Meesho, where every story begins with a spark of inspiration and a dash of entrepreneurial spirit. We're not just a platform; we're your partner in turning dreams into realities.

Curious about life at Meesho? Explore our Glassdoor - our people have a lot to say and they've helped us become a loved workplace in India.

Our Mission

Democratising internet commerce for everyone — Meesho (Meri Shop) started with a single idea in mind: to be an e-commerce destination for Indian consumers and to enable small businesses to succeed online.

We provide our sellers with benefits such as zero commission and affordable shipping solutions in the market. Today, sellers nationwide are growing their businesses by tapping into Meesho’s large and diverse customer base, state-of-the-art tech infrastructure, and pan-India logistics network through trusted third-party partners.

Affordable, relatable merchandise that mirrors local markets has helped us connect with internet users and serve customers across urban, semi-urban, and rural India. Our unique business model and continuous innovation have established us as a part of India’s e-commerce ecosystem.

Culture and Total Rewards

Our focus is on cultivating a dynamic workplace characterized by high impact and performance excellence. We prioritize a people-centric culture, dedicated to hiring and developing exceptional talent.

Total rewards at Meesho comprise a comprehensive set of elements — monetary, non-monetary, tangible, and intangible. Our 9 guiding principles, or "Mantras," are the backbone of how we operate, influencing everything from recognition and evaluation to growth discussions. Daily rituals and processes like “Problem First Mindset,” “Listen or Die,” our Internal Mobility Program, Talent Reviews, and Continuous Performance Management embody these principles.

We offer competitive compensation — both cash and equity-based — tailored to job roles, individual experience, and skill, along with employee-centric benefits and a supportive work environment. Our holistic wellness program, MeeCare, includes benefits across physical, mental, financial, and social wellness. This includes extensive medical insurance for employees and their families, wellness initiatives like telehealth, wellness events, and fitness-related perks.

To support work-life balance, we offer generous leave policies, parental support, retirement benefits, and learning and development assistance. Through personalized recognition, gratitude for stretched work, and engaging activities, we promote employee delight at the workplace. Additional benefits such as salary advance support, relocation assistance, and flexible benefit plans further enrich the Meesho experience.

Know more about Meesho here : https://www.meesho.io/

items.title: Workday HCM Business Analyst
items.description:
At Anaplan, we are a team of innovators focused on optimizing business decision-making through our leading AI-infused scenario planning and analysis platform so our customers can outpace their competition and the market.

What unites Anaplanners across teams and geographies is our collective commitment to our customers’ success and to our Winning Culture.

Our customers rank among the who’s who in the Fortune 50. Coca-Cola, LinkedIn, Adobe, LVMH and Bayer are just a few of the 2,400+ global companies who rely on our best-in-class platform.

Our Winning Culture is the engine that drives our teams of innovators. We champion diversity of thought and ideas, we behave like leaders regardless of title, we are committed to achieving ambitious goals, and we love celebrating our wins – big and small.

Supported by operating principles of being strategy-led, values-based and disciplined in execution, you’ll be inspired, connected, developed and rewarded here. Everything that makes you unique is welcome; join us and let’s build what’s next - together!

We are seeking a proactive and experienced Workday HCM Business Analyst to join our dynamic team. This role is crucial for supporting our ongoing HCM initiatives and enhancements. The role requires 5 – 7 years of hand-on experience supporting Workday HCM. As a self-starter, you will be responsible for both the daily support and the strategic improvement of our Workday platform, acting as a key liaison between business stakeholders and technical teams to drive successful outcomes.

Your Impact

As a Workday HCM Business Analyst, you will play a pivotal role in shaping and optimizing our HR systems and processes. Your work will directly contribute to the successful delivery of HCM initiatives, improve user experience, and ensure our Workday platform evolves to meet business needs. You will have the opportunity to make a significant impact by transforming business requirements into effective system solutions.

Key Responsibilities

  • Configure, maintain, and optimize Workday modules, including Core HCM, Benefits, Compensation, Learning, Time Tracking, and Absence Management.
  • Support and maintain compliance activities by ensuring HR data, system configurations, and business processes align with internal controls and regulatory requirements.
  • Partner with HR stakeholders’ team to provide data and requirements for Workday reports, dashboards, and analytics, while improving data integrity and governance.
  • Configure, test, and deploy Workday solutions, ensuring they meet business needs.
  • Proactively engage with the Workday community and other resources to research and diagnose issues, identify resolutions, and recommend best practices.
  • Manage and support Workday release cycles, including analyzing new features and assessing their impact and potential benefits.
  • Administer and maintain Workday security, including security group updates, access controls for various employee populations, and user notification configurations.
  • Develop and maintain system documentation, user guides, and training materials.

Your Qualifications

  • 5-7 years of experience as a Workday HCM Business Analyst or in a similar role.
  • Strong understanding and hands-on experience with Workday Core HCM, with specific expertise in Time Tracking, Absence, and Leave.
  • Proven ability to act as a self-starter, working independently to manage tasks and projects from conception to completion.
  • Experience in a support team environment, with the ability to handle escalations effectively.
  • Proven ability to manage complex issues independently while collaborating effectively across teams.
  • Strong experience in reporting, troubleshooting, and supporting production operations in Workday.
  • Excellent attention to detail and ability to perform accurate validation under tight deadlines

Desired Skills and Attributes

  • Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and critical-thinking skills.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with stakeholders at all levels.
  • A collaborative team player with a passion for learning and continuous improvement.
  • Workday certification is a plus.
  • Experience using Peakon, Greenhouse, ServiceNow.

Our Commitment to Diversity, Equity, Inclusion and Belonging (DEIB)

We believe attracting and retaining the best talent and fostering an inclusive culture strengthens our business. DEIB improves our workforce, enhances trust with our partners and customers, and drives business success. Build your career in a place where diversity, equity, inclusion and belonging aren’t just words on paper – this is what drives our innovation, it’s how we connect, and it contributes to what makes us a market leader. We believe in a hiring and working environment where all people are respected and valued, regardless of gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, age, neurodiversity, disability status, citizenship, or any other aspect which makes people unique. We hire you for who you are, and we want you to bring your authentic self to work every day! 

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, perform essential job functions, and receive equitable benefits and all privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.  

Fraud Recruitment Disclaimer  

It has come to our attention that fraudulent and fictitious job opportunities are being circulated on the Internet. Prospective candidates are being contacted by certain individuals, mainly through telephone calls, emails and correspondence, claiming they are representatives of Anaplan. The main purpose of these correspondences and announcements is to obtain privileged information from individuals.  

Anaplan does not:  

  • Extend offers to candidates without an extensive interview process with a member of our recruitment team and a hiring manager via video or in person.   
  • Send job offers via email. All offers are first extended verbally by a member of our internal recruitment team whenever possible and then followed up via written communication.  

All emails from Anaplan would come from an @anaplan.com email address. Should you have any doubts about the authenticity of an email, letter or telephone communication purportedly from, for, or on behalf of Anaplan, please send an email to people@anaplan.com before taking any further action in relation to the correspondence.

items.title: Director - Content Marketing, Colors
items.description:
Role Summary

This is a senior marketing role responsible for driving end-to-end content marketing strategy, execution excellence, and team capability building for Colors. The role owns launch and sustenance marketing for marquee properties, ensures disciplined ROI-led budget management, builds leadership depth within the team, and drives innovation across media, content, consumer insights, and technology.

Role Summary

This is a senior marketing role responsible for driving end-to-end content marketing strategy, execution excellence, and team capability building for Colors. The role owns launch and sustenance marketing for marquee properties, ensures disciplined ROI-led budget management, builds leadership depth within the team, and drives innovation across media, content, consumer insights, and technology.

Roles and Responsibilities

    Strategic Campaign Leadership: Own strategic planning, execution, and post-evaluation of launch and sustenance campaigns across fiction, non-fiction, events, and special properties. Drive learning-led optimisation by institutionalising campaign outcomes, reach movement analysis, and slot uplifts into future strategy. Define the role of key inputs such as GRPs, promotion windows, and forced sampling in maximising launch reach.

    Consumer & Media Strategy Excellence: Anchor consumer research integration into campaign design and media choices. Lead innovation in media solutions and effective paid non-TV strategies.

    Cross-Functional & External Collaboration: Provide senior leadership to collaborations with internal teams including Digital, OAP, Graphics, Content, Traffic, Presentation, Distribution, and Sales. Drive integrated B2B promotion initiatives with distribution partners and media agencies. Ensure seamless execution of brand integrations and partnership deliveries.

    People Leadership & Capability Building: Build a self-sufficient leadership layer by coaching and developing next layers into independent owners. Set clear accountability, ensure equitable project allocation, and maintain high performance standards during peak-pressure timelines. Foster a culture of collaboration, ownership, and innovation.

    AI Adoption & Transformation: Institutionalise disciplined adoption of AI tools across pitch development, creative ideation, copy optimisation, campaign planning, GTM decks, and leadership presentations. Improve speed, quality, and strategic sharpness of team outputs through AI-led workflows.

    Budget Ownership & ROI Governance: Own and optimise the annual content marketing budget with an ROI-first mindset.Deliver consistently strong ROI while improving cost efficiency across TV, digital, OOH, print, and on-ground media. Institutionalise ROI-based evaluation at approval stage for all marketing investments.

Skills and Attributes

    • Strong strategic thinking with proven experience in large-scale campaign leadership
    • Deep understanding of consumer behavior, media dynamics, and entertainment marketing
    • Strong people leadership and coaching capability
    • Data-driven decision making and ROI orientation
    • High innovation quotient with comfort in ambiguity and scale

Education & Experience

    • Bachelor’s / Master’s degree in Marketing or related discipline
    • 12–14 years of experience in Content Marketing / Brand Marketing / Media / Communications within entertainment or consumer-facing industries

items.title: Junior Marketing Analyst - Comms
items.description:
About Sezzle:

With a mission to financially empower the next generation, Sezzle is revolutionizing the shopping experience beyond payments, blending cutting-edge tech with seamless, interest-free installment plans that make shopping smarter and more accessible. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values.
