As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping!

About the Role: 

We are seeking a talented and motivated Marketing Analyst- Comms who is best in class, with a high IQ and a high EQ. This role presents an exciting opportunity to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment within a rapidly growing team, with strong prospects for continued growth and increased ownership.

The Marketing Analyst - Comms, will sit at the intersection of data, CRM strategy, and AI-driven efficiency. We’re looking for an execution-oriented person who owns their work from end-to-end. You'll dive into the details of how our campaigns operate across email, push, SMS, and in-app channels, spot friction and inefficiency, and design smarter ways forward. You'll spend most of your time inside Braze, Sezzle's primary consumer-focused CRM and marketing automation platform, building and analyzing campaigns across email, push, SMS, and in-app channels. You'll dig into performance data to identify what's working, surface gaps in our consumer journeys, and develop new comms to fill them. You'll also look for every opportunity to apply AI tools to make the team's output faster, sharper, and more scalable.
This isn't a role where you wait for assignments. We want someone who can look at a set of data, identify the opportunity, and start building toward it then communicate what  they found and why it matters to the team around them.

What You'll Do:

  • CRM Campaign Execution & Analysis

    • Build, launch, and iterate on campaigns and canvases in Braze across email, push, SMS, and in-app channels.

    • Audit existing consumer journeys to identify engagement gaps, drop-off points, and missed messaging opportunities.

    • Develop segmentation strategies and personalized comms that improve activation, engagement, and retention.

    • Support A/B test design, execution, and readout — translating results into clear, actionable recommendations.

    • Maintain performance dashboards and reporting frameworks that make campaign data interpretable for the broader marketing team.

    • Track KPIs including DAU, ARPDAU, LTV per user, open rates, click rates, and conversion, and surface insights tied to those metrics.

    • Effectively manage our marketing CRM tool to drive new and innovative use cases that can be shared across the team

    • Write SQL queries to investigate issues and campaign results using internal data

    AI, Automation & Process Optimization

    • Identify opportunities to apply AI tools and automation across marketing workflows from copy generation to campaign QA to performance analysis.

    • Build and iterate on tools, templates, and agents that reduce manual effort and improve output consistency.

    • Stay current on emerging AI/automation capabilities and bring concrete recommendations for how they can be applied within Sezzle's marketing stack.

    Cross-Functional Collaboration

    • Partner with marketing, product, data, and engineering teams to align on tooling decisions and ensure smooth implementation.

    • Serve as a connector between technical teams and marketing stakeholders, translating requirements in both directions.

    • Facilitate adoption of new tools and workflows by developing documentation, training materials, and hands-on support for team members.

    • Identify and flag integration risks early; bring concrete mitigation recommendations.

What We Look for:

  • Skills & Competencies

    • Hands-on experience building or implementing AI tools, agents, and automation in a professional setting.

    • Strong analytical skills, comfortable working with data, running queries, and presenting findings with context.

    • Experience in consumer marketing operations, CRM platforms (Braze or similar), or marketing technology stacks; Braze experience is a plus.

    • Ability to identify process inefficiencies and develop structured, scalable solutions.

    • Excellent written and verbal communication skills, and you can explain technical concepts clearly to non-technical teammates.

    • Basic project management skills; organized, proactive, and reliable with deadlines.

    • Experience with segmentation, A/B testing, and performance reporting.

    • Strong experience in data visualization tools and SQL.

    • Ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks simultaneously 

    Educational & Professional Experience

    • Background in computer science, analytics, engineering, AI, and/or related fields.

    • Exposure to business, marketing, finance, or other related fields

    • Previous internships or academic projects involving campaign management, marketing analytics, and content creation preferred.

    • Professional, academic or personal projects that demonstrate an ability to creatively use AI to create efficiencies.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience building AI-first platforms or internal products from scratch, including early architectural decisions.

  • Strong foundation in core machine learning and data science principles, including supervised/unsupervised learning, feature engineering, model evaluation, and statistical inference.

  • Experience with transformer architectures (BERT, GPT, etc.) and understanding of attention mechanisms, tokenization, and fine-tuning strategies for domain-specific applications.

  • Experience developing AI-assisted or agentic systems that interact with tools, data, or workflows.

  • Familiarity with embeddings and vector representations, including text embeddings, similarity search, and integration with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, or similar).

  • Experience with NLP techniques including text classification, named entity recognition, semantic search, and information extraction.

  • Familiarity with cloud-native development using AWS.

  • Understanding of prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and LLM application patterns.

  • Experience with containerized systems and orchestration tools such as Docker and Kubernetes.

  • Exposure to CI/CD pipelines and modern development workflows (e.g., GitLab).

  • Experience with Golang is a plus (or willingness to learn).

  • Experience with Braze or similar consumer facing CRM platforms and/or various B2C digital marketing channels like affiliate, CTV, paid social, paid search, GEO/SEO, DSP.

About You:

  • You have relentlessly high standards - many people may think your standards are unreasonably high. You are continually raising the bar and driving those around you to deliver great results. You make sure that defects do not get sent down the line and that problems are fixed so they stay fixed.

  • You’re not bound by convention - your success—and much of the fun—lies in developing new ways to do things

  • You need action - speed matters in business. Many decisions and actions are reversible and do not need extensive study. We value calculated risk-taking.

  • You earn trust - you listen attentively, speak candidly, and treat others respectfully.

What Makes Working at Sezzle Awesome:

At Sezzle, we are more than just brilliant engineers, passionate data enthusiasts, out-of-the-box thinkers, and determined innovators. We believe in surrounding ourselves with only the best and the brightest individuals. Our culture is not defined by a certain set of perks designed to give the illusion of the traditional startup culture, but rather, it is the visible example living in every employee that we hire. 

#Li-remote #full-time

items.title: Marketing Intern - Brand & Social Media
items.description:
Role Overview:

We are looking for a Brand & Social Media Marketing Intern to join our team and help build Hevo's brand presence across social and digital channels. This role offers hands-on experience in social media execution, brand storytelling, and community-led growth while working with a fast-growing B2B SaaS company.

Role Overview:

We are looking for a Brand & Social Media Marketing Intern to join our team and help build Hevo's brand presence across social and digital channels. This role offers hands-on experience in social media execution, brand storytelling, and community-led growth while working with a fast-growing B2B SaaS company.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Support the ideation and execution of content across LinkedIn and other social channels and experiment with formats including short-form video, reels, carousels, and thought leadership posts.
  • Assist in managing and growing community-led initiatives to drive ICP engagement and brand visibility.  
  • Stay current with social media trends, platform algorithm changes, and B2B content best practices to continuously improve execution.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

    • Strong written communication skills with an eye for brand voice, tone consistency, and audience relevance.

    • Basic understanding of social media platforms, particularly LinkedIn, and what drives engagement in a B2B context.

    • Comfort with data, ability to pull metrics, build simple reports, and translate numbers into insights.

    • Self-starter with strong attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple content workstreams simultaneously.

    • Interest in brand building, community growth, and B2B SaaS marketing (prior experience or internships in social/brand is a plus).

What You'll Gain:

  • Hands-on experience executing brand and social media strategy for a B2B SaaS company

  • Exposure to ICP-driven content strategy, community building, and social-led demand generation

  • A certificate of completion and a performance-based Pre-Placement Offer (PPO)

items.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
items.description:
Konovo is a global healthcare intelligence company on a mission to transform research through technology- enabling faster, better, connected insights.

Konovo provides healthcare organisations with access to over —the largest network of its kind globally. With a workforce of over 200 employees across 5 countries: India, Bosnia and Herzegovina, the United Kingdom, Mexico, we collaborate to support some of the most prominent names in healthcare. Our customers include over 300 global pharmaceutical companies, medical device manufacturers, research agencies, and consultancy firms.

As we transition from a service-oriented model to a product-driven platform, we are expanding our hybrid Bengaluru based team. We are looking for a Business Intelligence (BI) Analyst to contribute to our mission by partnering closely with BI leadership and cross-functional stakeholders to define core business metrics, translate data into insight, and support data-driven decision-making across the organization. The role involves leveraging existing data assets to deliver clear, trusted insights, with an emphasis on data storytelling, direct stakeholder support, and end-user engagement.

Apply now if you want to be a strategic partner in the BI process where your perspective helps refine recommendations, elevate data storytelling, and define how data drives decisions at scale.

This hybrid role requires alignment with global stakeholders and operates on a fixed shift schedule from either 2:00 PM – 11:00 PM IST or 6:30 PM – 3:30 AM IST.

How You’ll Make an Impact:

  • Partner with stakeholders to frame business questions, define hypotheses, and design analytical approaches that align with business goals

  • Work with various stakeholders to define which KPIs ensure clarity, consistency, and trust across reports and dashboards
  • Translate complex data into clear, compelling narratives that drive decision-making, combining strong analytical rigor with effective data storytelling
  • Own and execute BI requests, including translation of loosely defined or ambiguous asks into clear, actionable deliverables, dashboard development and enhancements, ad-hoc analyses, reconciliations, and metric validation

  • Ensure metrics are consistent across reporting, traceable to source systems, and clearly documented with reproducible logic

  • Proactively identify data gaps, inconsistencies, or missing context and work with stakeholders to resolve them

  • Monitor and flag data quality issues and help enforce consistent metric definitions and business rules

  • Collaborate closely with Data Engineering to define requirements for upstream transformations and ensure analytical needs are represented in technical planning
  • Ensure strict compliance with data governance and privacy standards, including the responsible handling of sensitive data (PII), adherence to access controls, and alignment with organizational and regulatory requirements

What We’re Looking For:

  • 5+ years of experience in Business Intelligence, Analytics, or a related data-focused role, preferably in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment

  • Proven ability to translate complex business problems into structured analytical approaches and deliver actionable insights

  • Strong experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker), with a focus on building intuitive, user-friendly dashboards that drive adoption

  • Demonstrated ability in data storytelling, including synthesizing complex analyses into clear, concise narratives tailored to both technical and non-technical audiences

  • Proficiency in SQL and experience working with relational databases and data warehouses; familiarity with data modeling concepts is strongly preferred

  • Experience working with large, complex datasets and integrating data across multiple sources (e.g., product, financial, operational systems)

  • Experience collaborating with Data Engineering and Product teams to define requirements and improve upstream data quality and availability

  • Excellent communication skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders, influence decisions, and build trust in data

Why Join Konovo?

  • Be part of a mission-driven organisation that is empowering life science researchers and data scientists with the broadest ecosystem of healthcare audiences and an intelligent, AI-enabled platform — so insights aren't just collected, they're connected.

  • Join a fast-growing global team with opportunities for professional growth and advancement.

  • Enjoy a collaborative and hybrid work environment that fosters innovation and flexibility.

  • Experience a workplace that puts employees first, offering a workplace designed for growth, well-being, and balance.

  • Become a part of an organisation that prioritizes your well-being with comprehensive benefits, including group medical coverage, accident insurance, and a robust leave policy. Our employee-centric policies ensure a rewarding and fulfilling work experience.

  • Make a real-world impact by helping healthcare organisations innovate faster.

If you’re eager to build a meaningful career in healthcare market research — and you’re smart, nice, and driven to make an impact — we’d love to hear from you!

items.title: Content Manager
items.description:
Content Manager — Everhope 

About Everhope 

Everhope is rethinking cancer care in India — building a system that is more human, more informed, and more supportive for patients and their families. 

We’re not just providing treatment. We’re building understanding, trust, and continuity through every stage of the journey. 

Content plays a central role in that.  

Role Overview 

We’re looking for a Content Manager with 3 - 5 years of experience who can own key parts of Everhope’s content ecosystem and help scale it with us. 

This is not a pure execution role. 
You’ll be expected to think, structure, and improve, not just write. 

You’ll work across: 

  • Education (blogs, guides, explainers)  
  • Patient communication (WhatsApp, CRM journeys)  
  • Website and landing page content (Including ads) 
  • Campaign and brand storytelling  

What You’ll Own 

1. Content Planning & Execution 

  • Execute against a monthly content plan across channels  
  • Contribute to shaping content priorities based on user needs  
  • Identify gaps and suggest new content ideas  

2. Writing & Editing 

  • Write and edit blogs, landing pages, emails, and WhatsApp flows  
  • Break down complex medical information into clear, accessible language  
  • Maintain consistency in tone and structure across formats  

3. Funnel & Lifecycle Content 

  • Support communication across the patient journey  
  • Work on improving engagement and conversion through content  
  • Collaborate with growth and product teams on messaging  

4. Collaboration 

  • Work with oncologists to ensure medical accuracy  
  • Partner with design and agencies 
  • Coordinate with freelancers or external writers when needed  

5. Content Quality 

  • Ensure content is clear, sensitive, and useful  
  • Follow and help refine content guidelines and tone of voice  
  • Keep the user’s emotional context in mind while writing  

 

What We’re Looking For 

  • 3–5 years of experience in content, copywriting, or editorial roles  
  • Strong writing and editing skills with attention to clarity and structure  
  • Ability to simplify complex topics without dumbing them down  
  • Some exposure to lifecycle, CRM, or funnel-based content  
  • Comfortable working with cross-functional teams  
  • Ownership mindset (you take initiative and move things forward)  

 

What Will Help You Do Well 

  • Experience in healthcare, wellness, or other high-trust categories  
  • Sensitivity to emotionally complex user journeys  
  • Ability to balance empathy with precision  
  • Interest in building systems, not just one-off pieces  

 

How We Work 

  • Small, focused teams with high ownership  
  • Fast-moving, but thoughtful  
  • Strong emphasis on clarity over volume  

 

Why This Role Matters 

Most cancer content today is either too clinical or too generic. This role helps bridge that gap by making it accurate, human, and actually useful.

items.title: Business Analyst - Platform Soutions
items.description:
WorldQuant develops and deploys systematic financial strategies across a broad range of asset classes and global markets. We seek to produce high-quality predictive signals (alphas) through our proprietary research platform to employ financial strategies focused on market inefficiencies. Our teams work collaboratively to drive the production of alphas and financial strategies – the foundation of a balanced, global investment platform.

WorldQuant is built on a culture that pairs academic sensibility with accountability for results. Employees are encouraged to think openly about problems, balancing intellectualism and practicality. Excellent ideas come from anyone, anywhere. Employees are encouraged to challenge conventional thinking and possess an attitude of continuous improvement.

Our goal is to hire the best and the brightest. We value intellectual horsepower first and foremost, and people who demonstrate an outstanding talent. There is no roadmap to future success, so we need people who can help us build it.

The Role: The Platform Solutions team assesses designs and improves the firm’s operating models to support current and future products. It considers how functions and systems align with product needs, identifies gaps and opportunities, and drives solutions to enable scalable growth within WorldQuant Millenium Advisors, a joint venture between WorldQuant and Millennium.

Reporting to the Global Head of Platform Solutions, this person will run the guideline monitoring function, support the operational evaluation of prospective and new products, assist with vendor initiatives, and provide business analysis and project management across related projects. More detailed role responsibilities include:

  • Support product onboarding for guideline monitoring, including rule interpretation, documentation, and testing within the guideline monitoring platform.
  • Support day-to-day guideline monitoring and reporting, including maintaining rules, report distribution, facilitation of breach review and resolution, and compliance reporting.
  • Produce reporting and analysis for compliance, performance & attribution, strategy, and related areas.
  • Analyze how functions and systems support products to identify gaps, risks and optimization opportunities.
  • Support vendor-related activities, including requirements gathering and coordination.
  • Generate, review, and validate portfolio statistics
  • Provide project management support including organizing meeting materials and tracking key objectives.

What You’ll Bring:

  • Bachelor’s degree in business, finance, accounting or similar analytical discipline
  • 2-5 years of relevant experience in a financial services industry role (e.g., Ops, Product)
  • Strong skills in requirements gathering, workflow building; experience with vendor management is helpful.
  • Ability to engage across many workstreams, operate well under tight deadlines with high detail orientation
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills, ability to work effectively with cross-functional stakeholders
  • Proficiency with Excel and PowerPoint; experience with process mapping tools (e.g., MS Visio)

Position based in Mumbai, India

By submitting this application, you acknowledge and consent to terms of the WorldQuant Privacy Policy. The privacy policy offers an explanation of how and why your data will be collected, how it will be used and disclosed, how it will be retained and secured, and what legal rights are associated with that data (including the rights of access, correction, and deletion). The policy also describes legal and contractual limitations on these rights. The specific rights and obligations of individuals living and working in different areas may vary by jurisdiction.

Copyright © 2025 WorldQuant, LLC. All Rights Reserved.
WorldQuant is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate in hiring on the basis of race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation or preference, age, marital status, citizenship, national origin, disability, military status, genetic predisposition or carrier status, or any other protected characteristic as established by applicable law.

items.title: IT Business Analyst (Intraday Liquidity Management)
items.description:
IT Business Analyst (Intraday Liquidity Management)

We are seeking an experienced System/Business Analyst to join our team working on the Intraday Liquidity Management System, which supports bank-wide intraday cash projections and reporting. The ideal candidate will possess deep domain knowledge in liquidity, financial markets, or cash management, combined with strong analytical and technical skills.

Collaborate with business stakeholders to scope requirements and propose feasible solutions aligned with business objectives.

  • Engage with technology, vendors, and change teams to develop a deep understanding of the end-to-end system architecture, implementation, and liquidity business processes.
  • Perform data analysis on large datasets to assess impacts and propose solutions for managing technology changes.
  • Prepare functional specifications using strong analytical and technical skills. Present solution designs and system architectures effectively.
  • Define cost-effective and detailed technology solutions that comply with business needs and regulatory standards.
  • Provide support across all phases of the project lifecycle – including testing strategy, data migration, and release planning.
  • Promote simplified and consolidated technology design and integration architecture.
  • Build and maintain relationships with key business and technology stakeholders.
  • Deliver clear and timely communications to senior management and stakeholders

  • Experience as a Analyst in Liquidity, Financial Markets, Payments, or Cash domains.
  • Proven expertise in liquidity management and understanding of regulatory mandates (e.g., Global Regulators).
  • Strong background in sourcing and mapping data from various TP data frameworks.
  • Experience with large-scale system upgrades and re-engineering initiatives.
  • Ability to manage workload independently and deliver results in complex environments with multiple dependencies.

 

Technical skills:

  • Hands-on experience in SQL, PL/SQL
  • Knowledge in Unix, Scripting, Data analytics tools
  • Understanding to Enterprise tools

 

Desirable but not Essential

  • Knowledge or working experience in SAP-LMS, SAC
  • Exposure to Automation and/or data visualization tools

Previous experience as a software developer

items.title: Growth Content Manager
items.description:
Cresta is on a mission to turn every customer conversation into a competitive advantage by unlocking the true potential of the contact center. Our platform combines the best of AI and human intelligence to help contact centers discover customer insights and behavioral best practices, automate conversations and inefficient processes, and empower every team member to work smarter and faster. 

We’ve assembled a world-class team of AI and ML experts, go-to-market leaders, and top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz, Greylock Partners, Sequoia, and former AT&T CEO John Donovan. Our valued customers include brands like United Airlines, Intuit, and Cox Communications, and we’ve been recognized by Forbes and Bain Consulting as one of the top private AI companies in the world. 

We are looking for an exceptional Growth Content Manager to build and scale Cresta’s organic growth engine across SEO, AEO (AI Engine Optimization), and AI-scaled content initiatives. In this highly visible role, you will own the strategy and execution of scalable content programs that drive organic discovery, engagement, and pipeline across both traditional search engines and emerging AI-driven search experiences. You will play a key role in defining how Cresta shows up when buyers research AI, contact center transformation, and automation.

RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Own the vision, strategy, and management of Cresta’s organic growth engine across SEO and AEO
  • Scale and optimize our AI-scaled content initiatives focused on experimentation and high-leverage opportunities
  • Develop scalable, derivative content frameworks that can be reused across channels and campaigns
  • Own and drive progress against a number of high-priority website content initiatives
  • Translate complex AI capabilities into clear, differentiated messaging that resonates with enterprise buyers
  • Optimize content for both traditional search engines and AI answer engines
  • Partner with Marketing Ops to establish KPI frameworks, dashboards, and reporting for organic performance
  • Deliver regular reporting and insights on content performance and growth opportunities
  • Improve and scale the use of AI tools in content workflows, including building templates and internal systems
  • Experiment with new content formats, including interactive experiences and rapid prototyping
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with product marketing, demand generation, and sales

QUALIFICATIONS

  • 4-6 years of experience in content marketing, SEO, or growth content roles within a SaaS or B2B technology company
  • Proven success building and scaling content programs that drive measurable organic traffic or pipeline impact
  • Strong understanding of SEO fundamentals and content strategy
  • Excellent writing and messaging skills, with the ability to simplify complex technical concepts
  • Highly data-driven, with experience in performance analysis and reporting
  • Strong cross-functional collaboration skills
  • Ability to operate in ambiguous environments and build from early-stage foundations
  • Coachable, resilient, and highly motivated to drive outcomes

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

  • Experience in contact center technology or customer experience software
  • Experience in hypergrowth startups or scale-up environments
  • Background experience in product marketing or solutions marketing

Perks & Benefits:

We offer a comprehensive and people-first benefits package to support you at work and in life:

  • Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage with plans to fit you and your family
  • Flexible PTO to take the time you need, when you need it
  • Paid parental leave for all new parents welcoming a new child
  • Retirement savings plan to help you plan for the future
  • Remote work setup budget to help you create a productive home office
  • Monthly wellness and communication stipend to keep you connected and balanced
  • In-office meal program and commuter benefits provided for onsite employees

Compensation at Cresta:

Cresta’s approach to compensation is simple: recognize impact, reward excellence, and invest in our people. We offer competitive, location-based pay that reflects the market and what each individual brings to the table.

The posted base salary range represents what we expect to pay for this role in a given location. 

Final offers are shaped by factors like experience, skills, education, and geography. In addition to base pay, total compensation includes equity and a comprehensive benefits package for you and your family.

Salary Range: $140k - $170k + Equity

We have noticed a rise in recruiting impersonations across the industry, where scammers attempt to access candidates' personal and financial information through fake interviews and offers. All Cresta recruiting email communications will always come from the @cresta.ai domain. Any outreach claiming to be from Cresta via other sources should be ignored. If you are uncertain whether you have been contacted by an official Cresta employee, reach out to recruiting@cresta.ai

items.title: Analyst, Digital Marketing
items.description:
About Us

Pearl is AI for professional services at global scale—combining advanced AI with verified human expertise to deliver help that’s accurate, accountable, and fast. Since 2003, our network has connected millions of customers with licensed professionals across 196 countries, making real expertise available anytime, anywhere.

Our Values

  • Data driven: Data decides, not egos
  • Courageous: We take risks and challenge the status quo
  • Innovative: We're constantly learning, creating, and adapting
  • Lean: We focus on customers, using lean testing to learn how to serve them best
  • Humble: Past success is not a guarantee of future success

 

About the Role

As a Analyst, Digital Marketing, you will manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns, analyze performance data, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive better ROAS/CPA while maintaining robust tracking and reporting practices.

What You’ll Do

  • Build and optimize Google Ads campaigns, including structure, keyword research, targeting, and ad creatives.
  • Conduct experiments, analyze segmented performance data, and drive improvements in CTR, conversion rate, ROAS, and CPA.
  • Monitor daily metrics, identify anomalies, and address performance or tracking issues proactively.
  • Use Excel and SQL to analyze large datasets and support bid/budget optimization decisions.
  • Collaborate with Analytics, Product, Engineering, and market teams while ensuring strong tracking, tagging, and measurement hygiene (UTMs, GA4, conversion tracking).

What We’re Looking For

What We’re Looking For 

  • 5–8 years of experience in performance/search marketing, including 3+ years managing Google Ads campaigns end-to-end.
  • Strong knowledge of Google Ads fundamentals, bidding strategies, auction dynamics, quality score, and search query analysis.
  • Data-driven mindset with the ability to define KPIs, analyze trends, and make evidence-based recommendations.
  • Advanced Excel/Sheets skills and working knowledge of SQL for handling large datasets.
  • Familiarity with GA/GA4, conversion tracking, and attribution basics.
  • Clear communicator, comfortable sharing insights with cross-functional teams.
  • Flexible to attend planned evening IST meetings to overlap with US teams.
  • Leverages AI for creatives, keyword clustering, anomaly detection, real-time insights, and automated reporting to enhance strategy and efficiency.

Good to have

  • Google Ads Search certified or equivalent practical experience.
  • Exposure to Microsoft Ads, Display/YouTube, or other paid channels.
  • Experience with dashboarding tools (Looker Studio, Power BI, Tableau) and/or basic scripting (Python).
  • Familiar with A/B testing, experimentation frameworks, and statistical fundamentals.
  • Comfortable using LLM/prompting tools to enhance analysis and reporting productivity (as per policy).

Our Commitment to an Inclusive Workplace

We welcome people from all backgrounds who seek the opportunity to help build a future where professional services are readily available to all. If you have curiosity, passion, and a collaborative spirit, come work with us. Pearl is committed to an inclusive workplace. Pearl is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

AI Disclosure & Informed Consent

Artificial intelligence (AI) technology may be used during the hiring process to record, transcribe, analyze, and rank interview responses. By submitting your application and participating in the interview process, you acknowledge and consent to the use of AI technology in the hiring process. For more information see our AI Disclosure and Consent Policy.
#LI-Remote

items.title: Temenos Transact FX Business Analyst
items.description:
Capgemini is seeking a skilled Temenos Transact FX Business Analyst to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will act as a bridge between business stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring the successful implementation and enhancement of Temenos Transact FX solutions. You will gather and analyze business requirements, provide insights into foreign exchange operations, and support system configuration to drive business improvements and operational efficiency.

As a Temenos Transact FX Business Analyst, you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to translate business needs into technical specifications, validate system functionalities, and participate in UAT processes. You will play a crucial role in facilitating communications between business units and IT to ensure system alignment with business goals.

The key requirements of this multi-facted role are:

Business Analysis & Requirements

  • Engage with business stakeholders (Front Office, Operations, Treasury, Finance, Risk, Compliance) to elicit and document FX business requirements within a core banking context.
  • Analyse existing FX processes and define target-state FX operating models aligned to Temenos Transact capabilities.
  • Produce high-quality artefacts including:
  • Business Requirements Documents (BRD)
    • Functional Specifications (FS)
    • Process flows and swimlane diagrams
    • Data mappings and interface specifications
  • Ensure clear traceability of requirements through design, build, test, and deployment.

Temenos Transact FX Functional Expertise

  • Act as the functional SME for FX in Temenos Transact, including:
    • FX deal capture (spot, forward, swaps – as applicable)
    • Deliverable FX products (sport and forward)
    • Non-Deliverable Forwards (NDFs) for restricted currencies
    • FX rates, spreads, and pricing models
    • FX settlement and nostro/vostro processing
    • FX accounting and P&L treatment
    • Revaluation and end-of-day processing
  • Configure and support Transact FX-related components in collaboration with technical teams (no standalone TAP configuration).
  • Advise on standard Transact functionality vs. customisation, promoting out-of-the-box usage where possible.

Integration & Data

  • Define and support FX-related integrations between Transact and surrounding systems, such as:
  • Trading or order capture systems
    • Market data / rate providers
    • Payments engines and clearing systems
    • GL, Finance, Risk, and Regulatory Reporting platforms
    • Produce FX data mappings covering deal lifecycle, rates, settlements, and accounting entries.
    • Support reconciliation processes across FX, payments, and accounting systems.

Testing & Delivery Support

  • Support SIT, UAT, and regression testing phases for FX scope:
  • Review and validate FX test scenarios and test cases
  • Support defect triage and resolution
  • Validate FX results (rates, settlements, accounting postings)
  • Work closely with product owners and delivery leads to ensure FX scope is delivered on time and to quality.
  • Support cutover, migration, and go-live activities related to FX portfolios.

Essential

Strong Business Analyst experience on Temenos Transact (T24) programmes

8+ years of experience delivering FX functionality within a Transact core banking environment, including:

  • FX Spot and FX Forward products
  • Non‑Deliverable Forwards (NDFs) for emerging or restricted currencies
  • Understanding of deliverable vs non‑deliverable FX settlement models
  • FX lifecycle from deal capture through settlement, accounting, and revaluation
  • Interaction between FX products, payments, and core banking accounting

Solid understanding of:

  • FX products and lifecycle
  • FX settlements and accounting
  • Interaction between FX and payments
  • Experience working in large-scale banking transformation programmes.
  • Strong documentation, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

 Desirable

  • Experience in Private Banking or Wealth Management environments.
  • Knowledge of regulatory considerations impacting FX (e.g. MiFID II, EMIR, best execution – where applicable).
  • Experience working across multi-country or multi-entity banking rollouts.
  • Prior experience replacing or integrating with standalone FX/trading platforms (including TAP) is an advantage.

Soft Skills:

  • Client facing
  • Confident and articulate
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Able to build relationship with business stakeholders and other team members
  • Ability to lead a team

 

Competitive compensation and benefits package:

  1. Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses
  2. Comprehensive benefits package
  3. Career development and training opportunities
  4. Flexible work arrangements (remote and/or office-based)
  5. Dynamic and inclusive work culture within a globally renowned group
  6. Private Health Insurance
  7. Retirement Benefits
  8. Paid Time Off
  9. Training & Development
  10. Performance Bonus

Note: Benefits differ based on employee level.

About Capgemini

Capgemini is a global leader in partnering with companies to transform and manage their business by harnessing the power of technology. The Group is guided everyday by its purpose of unleashing human energy through technology for an inclusive and sustainable future. It is a responsible and diverse organization of over 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong 59-year heritage and deep industry expertise, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to address the entire breadth of their business needs, from strategy and design to operations, fueled by the fast evolving and innovative world of cloud, data, AI, connectivity, software, digital engineering and platforms. The Group €22.5 billion in revenues in 2025.

items.title: Associate Director – Brand Marketing, Emerging Sports Growth
items.description:
We are looking for a marketer with a genuine passion for sports beyond cricket: someone who understands how to build fandom around emerging and under-penetrated properties.

As the marketing champion for JioStar’s emerging sports portfolio - including Kabaddi, Wimbledon, WPL, Esports, and other strategic non-cricket properties. You will be responsible for driving audience growth, building cultural relevance, and turning niche interest into sustained viewing habits.

This role is ideal for someone who combines fan empathy, challenger-brand thinking, and strong execution capability to build momentum for both marquee international properties and fast-growing domestic sports.

We are looking for a marketer with a genuine passion for sports beyond cricket: someone who understands how to build fandom around emerging and under-penetrated properties.

As the marketing champion for JioStar’s emerging sports portfolio - including Kabaddi, Wimbledon, WPL, Esports, and other strategic non-cricket properties. You will be responsible for driving audience growth, building cultural relevance, and turning niche interest into sustained viewing habits.

This role is ideal for someone who combines fan empathy, challenger-brand thinking, and strong execution capability to build momentum for both marquee international properties and fast-growing domestic sports.

What You Will Do:

  • Own end-to-end audience growth for JioStar’s emerging sports portfolio, driving awareness, trials, repeat viewership, and stronger top-of-mind recall across seasons.
  • Develop differentiated growth strategies for each property based on its audience opportunity, market maturity, and fandom potential. For example, driving mainstream aspiration for Kabaddi, sustaining women’s sports fandom for WPL, building premium occasioning for Wimbledon, and creating youth-native momentum for Esports.
  • Identify core audience segments, understand fan motivations, and uncover the emotional, cultural, and behavioral triggers that drive discovery, engagement, and repeat consumption.
  • Build property-specific consumer narratives by leveraging rivalries, athlete personalities, cultural moments, youth trends, regional relevance, and social conversations to deepen audience affinity.
  • Design and execute audience acquisition initiatives that convert niche interest into sustained fan habit and long-term engagement.
  • Identify high-potential growth pockets and create cost-efficient, high-impact interventions to expand audience reach.
  • Partner across digital, social, influencers, PR, and on-ground communities to build momentum and relevance for emerging sports properties.
  • Continuously experiment with new fan acquisition approaches, measure performance, and optimize interventions to improve growth outcomes.
  • Collaborate with Programming, Research, Social, PR, Partnerships, Acquisition, Product, Distribution, and Commercial teams to ensure the right visibility, narrative support, and platform prominence for each property.
  • Champion emerging sports properties internally by building alignment and driving long-term focus on audience growth.

What we are looking for:

  • 6–8 years of experience in brand marketing, growth marketing, or audience development, preferably in sports, media, entertainment, or consumer internet.
  • Strong understanding of consumer behaviour, audience segmentation, and brand-building fundamentals.
  • Demonstrated ability to create and scale marketing interventions that drive audience growth and engagement.
  • Experience working across cross-functional teams to deliver integrated marketing initiatives.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify growth opportunities and translate insights into action.
  • High ownership mindset with the ability to operate effectively in fast-paced, evolving business environments.
  • Passion for sports (especially Cricket), and a strong interest in building fandom for emerging properties.
About Us
Perched firmly at the nucleus of spellbinding content and innovative technology, JioStar is a leading global media & entertainment company that is reimagining the way audiences consume entertainment and sports. Its television network and streaming service together reach more than 750 million viewers every week, igniting the dreams and aspirations of hundreds of million people across geographies.

 JioStar is an equal opportunity employer. The company values diversity and its mission is to create a workplace where everyone can bring their authentic selves to work. The company ensures that the work environment is free from any discrimination against persons with disabilities, gender, gender identity and any other characteristics or status that is legally protected.

items.title: Implementation Operations Business Analyst
items.description:
Job Summary:

The Operations Analyst II is responsible for the implementation project delivery that encompasses project delivery, integration, utilization, and product education.  Implementation Operations is a technical team responsible for product configuration (mainly for Vendormate Credentialing), email campaigns, and reporting that support implementation and increase product utilization.  The team seeks a motivated, dependable, and detail-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced and evolving work environment. The Operations Analyst II executes various work requests for implementation and customer maintenance, recurring responsibilities, and special projects.  

Duties and Responsibilities

  • Lead and coordinate data collection, analyze, and assimilate data into a format easily understood by end users. You will apply proven communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills to help maximize the company’s revenue 
  • Gather, analyze, and assimilate data into a format for internal users. This will encompass conducting QA efforts to ensure work is being completed accurately and in a timely manner for utmost customer satisfaction.
  • Complete work requests and, from time to time, review the work of other Analysts for product configuration, email campaigns, and reporting 
  • Demonstrate initiative by taking a proactive approach to seek and provide feedback on people, process improvement, and product. 
  • Maintain internal customer satisfaction scores of 95% or greater across all teams supported 
  • Solid technical skills with developing knowledge of GHX’s suite of products, beginning with Vendormate Credentialing, which is a provider product line that enables hospitals to manage their vendors’ regulatory compliance and onsite access 
  • Behaviour that exhibits the GHX core values of Collaborate, Innovate, Inspire, and Grow 
  • Other recurring responsibilities and special projects, as assigned 

Required Qualifications: 

  • Bachelor’s degree in technical, business, or management discipline + 3 years relevant experience
  • Expert in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel 
  • 1+ years of data analysis experience 
  • Team-oriented person with intense focus on problem-solving, attention to detail, quality, and customer service 
  • Embrace change with positive intent and work collaboratively to improve processes 
  • Ability to multitask while completing work requests, projects, and recurring responsibilities 
  • Aptitude for manipulating, analyzing, and displaying data  
  • Capability to follow established processes and contribute to process improvement 
  • Proficiency in planning, prioritizing, and executing tasks  
  • Effective written and verbal communication with customers, peers, and management 

Preferred Qualifications: 

  • 1+ years of relevant business experience 
  • Database experience (MS Access, MS Excel, SQL or related) 
  • Basic understanding of computer programming  
  • Experience with Salesforce.com, MailChimp, Jasper, and Tableau 

GHX: It's the way you do business in healthcare
Global Healthcare Exchange (GHX) enables better patient care and billions in savings for the healthcare community by maximizing automation, efficiency and accuracy of business processes.

GHX is a healthcare business and data automation company, empowering healthcare organizations to enable better patient care and maximize industry savings using our world class cloud-based supply chain technology exchange platform, solutions, analytics and services. We bring together healthcare providers and manufacturers and distributors in North America and Europe - who rely on smart, secure healthcare-focused technology and comprehensive data to automate their business processes and make more informed decisions.

It is our passion and vision for a more operationally efficient healthcare supply chain, helping organizations reduce - not shift - the cost of doing business, paving the way to delivering patient care more effectively. Together we take more than a billion dollars out of the cost of delivering healthcare every year. GHX is privately owned, operates in the United States, Canada and Europe, and employs more than 1000 people worldwide. Our corporate headquarters is in Colorado, with additional offices in Europe.

Disclaimer
Global Healthcare Exchange, LLC and its North American subsidiaries (collectively, “GHX”) provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, age, genetic information, disability, veteran status or any other status protected by applicable law. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any status protected by applicable law. This EEO policy applies to all terms, conditions, and privileges of employment, including hiring, training and development, promotion, transfer, compensation, benefits, educational assistance, termination, layoffs, social and recreational programs, and retirement.GHX believes that employees should be provided with a working environment which enables each employee to be productive and to work to the best of his or her ability. We do not condone or tolerate an atmosphere of intimidation or harassment based on race, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, age, genetic information, disability, veteran status or any other status protected by applicable law. GHX expects and requires the cooperation of all employees in maintaining a discrimination and harassment-free atmosphere. Improper interference with the ability of GHX’s employees to perform their expected job duties is absolutely not tolerated.

Read our GHX Privacy Policy

items.title: Business Analyst - Deputy Manager - Travel
items.description:
About Us:Paytm is India's leading mobile payments and financial services distribution company. Pioneer of the mobile QR payments revolution in India, Paytm builds technologies that help small businesses with payments and commerce. Paytm’s mission is to serve half a billion Indians and bring them to the mainstream economy with the help of technology

About the team:
Be a part of one of Paytm's fastest growing businesses - Travel. Travel was launched in 2016 and in less than 12 months we became India's 2nd largest online travel booking platform for Flights, Trains, Hotels and Bus tickets. Paytm's Travel business is entirely based out of Bangalore. We are like a 300-member startup within Paytm working in a fast paced environment. Our team comprises Product & Design, Engineering, Business and Customer Experience functions. Paytm Travel has revolutionized the travel industry - with a goal to empower millions of travelers who choose us as their preferred travel partner.


About the team: Paytm Travel has revolutionized the travel industry - intending to empower millions of travelers who choose us as their preferred travel partner. Being one of the largest travel platforms in the country, we aim to not only ensure seamless, instant booking, but also a delightful journey. We strive to enrich the customer experience by making every transaction transparent, honest and hassle-free. To stay ahead of the curve, we are working aggressively towards our ambition to make travel affordable for all. With this customer centricity at our core, we strive to make Paytm Travel synonymous with trustworthy travel partners.

Key Responsibilities
1. You are a dynamic problem solver, driven by a passion for data and the compelling narratives it reveals.
2. Constantly challenging the status quo, you possess a keen ability to understand and navigate its complexities.
3. Graduates/Post Grads from Tier 1/2 colleges with Engineering, Management/ Finance background are preferred.
4. Strong working knowledge in SQL, Excel and visualization tools like Looker, Tableau.
5. Understanding of Data-analysis languages like R/Python in core Statistical Concepts is expected.
6. Support the development, execution and optimization of growth campaigns across various channels to enhance user acquisition, engagement and retention.
7. Familiar with CRM platforms like Clevertap/Mo-engage.Familiarity with Digital marketing channels and metrics.
8. Develop and implement sophisticated customer segmentation strategies to personalize marketing efforts, enhance targeting accuracy, and drive impactful engagement.
9. Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams like Marketing, Business, Finance, Product, Tech to ensure alignment and drive growth initiatives.

Qualifications:
1) Bachelor's or Master's degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, or a related field
2) 3-5 Years of experience working as Growth Analyst/Business Analyst in an e-commerce or similar domain (Mandatory).
3) Strong analytical skills and experience with statistical analysis, data mining, and machine learning techniques
4) Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a cross-functional team environment
5) Experience with data visualization tools such as Google Data Studio or Looker.
6) Proficiency in SQL and experience with database systems such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or HiveQL.
7) Expertise with programming languages such as Python or R is a plus

Why join us :  We aim at bringing half a billion Indians into the mainstream economy, and everyone working here is striving to achieve that goal. Our success is rooted in our people’s collective energy and unwavering focus on the customers, and that’s how it will always be. We are the largest merchant acquirer in India.

Compensation: If you are the right fit, we believe in creating wealth foryou.With enviable 500 mn+ registered users, 21 mn+ merchants, and depth of data in our ecosystem, we are in a unique position to democratize credit for deserving consumers & merchants – and we are committed to it. India’s largest digital lending story is brewing here. It’s your opportunity to be a part of the story!

items.title: Principal Consultant- Business Analyst
items.description:
The Model N Hi-Tech (HT) team is looking for candidates with strong BA and QA experience who will be responsible for developing, applying and maintaining quality standards for company products with adherence to both internal and external standards. The incumbent is expected to create functional requirement specifications, Analyse and elicit requirements, assist in quality assurance testing, and help train end-users of the application. He should also be able to analyse, write test standards and procedures & document test results. This position requires excellent verbal and written communication skills.

The Model N Hi-Tech (HT) team is looking for candidates with strong BA and QA experience who will be responsible for developing, applying and maintaining quality standards for company products with adherence to both internal and external standards. The incumbent is expected to create functional requirement specifications, Analyse and elicit requirements, assist in quality assurance testing, and help train end-users of the application. He should also be able to analyse, write test standards and procedures & document test results. This position requires excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Participate in implementations of Model N systems as a member of the Professional Services BA/QA Team.
  • Participate in requirements gathering and documentation.
  • Participate in performing gap analysis between system and requirements.
  • Assist customers with understanding the system.
  • Review requirements, specifications, user documentation, help files, and other project documentation to assure quality of the products.
  • Formulate test scenarios, test cases and participate in testing the requirements
  • Issue Management and tracking test script lifecycle in Jira
  • Lead daily/weekly calls with onshore and offshore team members and guide the team
  • Work with key business units to identify, diagnose, and solve existing process and system issues
  • Provide application support and business analysis for new and existing systems
  • Facilitate tactical planning and strategic development of process and procedures during project implementation.
  • Author and peer review test scripts for accuracy and effectiveness.
  • Identified, tracked, and resolved issues, acting as first point of contact for functional clarifications

Job Qualification

  • 8+ years of experience with business process modelling and process improvement is desired.
  • Experience with enterprise software (SAP, Siebel, Oracle, etc.) implementations is preferred.
  • Working knowledge of databases, application servers, Java. Programming experience is not required.
  • Knowledge on Jira and Linux will be added advantage.
  • Experience with other scripting language such as JavaScript. will qualify for consideration.
  • Strong SQL experience in data validation for the correctness of analytics applications.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
  • Ability to work on technically complex projects project with aggressive deadlines.
  • Experience in testing software in an Agile development environment and continuous integration is highly desired.
  • BE/BTech or ME/MTech Degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience.
About Model N  
Model N is the leader in revenue optimization and compliance for pharmaceutical, medtech and high-tech innovators. For more than 25 years, we have helped customers maximize revenue, streamline operations, and maintain compliance through cloud-based software, value-add services, and data-driven insights. With a focus on innovation and customer success, Model N empowers life sciences and high-tech manufacturers to bring life-changing products to the world more efficiently and profitably. Model N is trusted by over 150 of the world’s leading companies across more than 120 countries. For more information, visit www.modeln.com.

items.title: FBS Business Analyst III
items.description:

items.title: Associate Director - Content Marketing, Star Jalsha
items.description:
About the Team:

We are the powerhouse behind the biggest and most influential channels in the East- Star Jalsha, Jalsha Movies, Colors Bangla, Colors Bangla Cinema, Star Kiran- setting trends and redefining regional entertainment. At the core, the team drives creative vision and content strategy by blending compelling storytelling with sharp audience insights and business impact. From fiction and non-fiction to marquee events, we create high-impact content that resonates with viewers and delivers market leadership.

 About the Role:

The incumbent will be responsible for owning brand solutions for Star Jalsha and play a pivotal role in ensuring the revenue targets for the channel.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop comprehensive brand solution strategies and sponsorship packages for Star Jalsha’s properties across
  • Partner with the Sales team to create compelling pitch decks and present customized content solutions to key clients, media agencies, and brand managers.
  • Work closely with the Programming, Creative Communications and Research teams to ensure brand integrations are woven into the formats/ shows, without compromising the viewer experience.
  • Oversee the complete lifecycle of brand campaigns, from initial brainstorming and pitching to on-ground execution and final post-evaluation reporting.
  • Monitor the P&L alongside the sales team, ensuring that ambitious revenue targets are met or exceeded.
  • Track competitor activities, regional market trends, and emerging brand solution formats to keep Star Jalsha ahead of the curve.

 Performance Measures:

  • Achievement of financial and revenue targets
  • Percentage of brand campaigns executed perfectly within the agreed timelines
  • Feedback scores from clients, brand managers, and media agencies after the campaign is completed and timely delivery of final post-evaluation reports for all executed campaigns
  • reach and viewership targets for shows and campaigns
  • Successful weaving of brands into shows without causing a drop in viewer ratings or complaints about compromised viewer experience
  • Number of new, compelling sponsorship packages or unique brand solution formats developed during the year
  • Positive feedback from internal partners (Sales, Programming, Creative, and Research) on teamwork and project management

Qualifications, Knowledge & Skills:

  • Master’s degree or MBA in Marketing, Communications, or a related field is preferred.
  • 8-10 years of experience in brand solutions, content monetization, media planning, or TV marketing.
  • Deep understanding of the television broadcasting industry, particularly non-fiction and reality show formats.
  • Exceptional presentation and storytelling abilities, strong commercial acumen, and a proven track record of closing high-value sponsorships.
  • Experience in managing multiple stakeholders.
  • Strong decision-making and problem-solving capabilities in high-pressure, fast-paced environments

 Personal Attributes:

  • High energy, assertive, and driven to achieve excellence
  • Ability to perform under pressure and manage tight deadlines effectively
  • Agile and adaptable in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
  • Strong collaborative mindset and team orientation
  • Confident communicator with strong interpersonal presence
  • High level of ownership, accountability, and resilience
  • Passionate about content, entertainment, and audience engagement

items.title: Business Analyst (Contact Center Domain)
items.description:
We are looking for an experienced Business Analyst with strong exposure to Contact Center projects and a solid understanding of Microsoft Dynamics. The ideal candidate will work closely with business stakeholders, solution architects, and technical teams to gather requirements, design solutions, and support implementation in complex customer engagement environments.

items.title: Senior Business Continuity Analyst
items.description:
Who We Are

Launchpad Technologies Inc. is a global technology partner connecting top talent with high-impact projects across North America and beyond. We specialize in Staff Augmentation and product development, helping companies scale with agility while empowering professionals to grow in meaningful, remote-first environments.

What we are looking for

We're looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Senior Business Continuity Analyst ready to support a growing enterprise resilience program. If you're passionate about risk management, process improvement, and cloud-based DR practices, this could be the next step in your career.

📅Start date: ASAP
🖋️Contract type: Full-time / Contractor
🕘Work hours: Monday to Friday, 10 AM - 6 PM PST
💻Work mode: 100% remote

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Supporting the development, maintenance, and execution of BC/DR procedures, SOPs, and documentation.
  • Assisting with impact assessments, plan creation, testing, training, and awareness initiatives across departments.
  • Tracking and reporting on program metrics to measure resilience effectiveness.
  • Coordinating with internal teams and third-party vendors to ensure accurate and up-to-date recovery procedures.
  • Managing central documentation repositories (plans, test results, contact lists, etc.).
  • Assisting with compliance audits and certification activities (e.g., ISO 27001, ISO 22301).
  • Contributing to cross-functional improvements and participating in sessions to drive operational continuity.

What You Need to Succeed

Must-haves

  • 5+ years of experience in risk, compliance, business continuity, or a related operations or governance field.
  • Understanding of risk and control concepts, including mitigation and measurement.
  • Strong organizational and planning skills, with attention to detail.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
  • Ability to collaborate in small team settings and deliver results independently with guidance.
  • Familiarity with tools like Jira, Confluence and Google Workspace.
  • Knowledge of standards such as ISO 22301, ISO 27001, and NIST frameworks.
  • Trustworthy, accountable, adaptable, and eager to learn

Nice-to-haves

  • Experience with BC software tools (e.g., Riskonnect).
  • Understanding of application or infrastructure architecture.
  • Exposure to cloud services (PaaS, SaaS, IaaS) and how they impact recovery planning

What to Expect from Our Hiring Process

(We might merge some of the instances in order to provide a smoother and shorter process)

  1. Intro Chat – 60 min with our Talent team
  2. Cultural Fit – 30 min with our Team Engagement Manager
  3. Meet the Team - 30/60 min with the Program Manager
  4. Technical Interview - 30/60 min with the Team
  5. Final Check - 30 min with the Senior Manager

Why You’ll Love Working at Launchpad

  • 💻 100% remote from anywhere
  • 💸 Competitive compensation in USD
  • 🧠 Training allowances for upskilling
  • 🌍 Work with global teams and top-tier clients
  • 🖥 Home-office hardware setup
  • 🏖 PTO for recharge and balance
  • 🫶 People-first culture built on trust, autonomy, and impact

Compliance & Equal Opportunity

Launchpad is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive environment for all applicants. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected status under applicable laws in Canada and British Columbia.

All candidate information will be handled confidentially and used solely for recruitment purposes in accordance with applicable privacy regulations.

 

Ready to make your mark? Apply now and be part of something exciting!

items.title: Temenos Triple'A Plus (TAP) Business Analyst
items.description:
Capgemini is seeking a skilled Temenos Triple'A Plus (TAP) Business Analyst to join our dynamic team.

The successful candidate will play a vital role in bridging business requirements and technology solutions within banking and financial services projects, particularly focusing on Temenos TAP implementations and enhancements. We’d particularly like to hear from you if you have experience working in TAP Wealth management solution. These roles represent a unique opportunity build your career as a Banking I.T. professional and gain further exposure to some of the world’s top banking institutions.  

As a vital part of our business unit, you’ll contribute to first-class end-to-end solutions in your assignments. You will play an active role in defining our practices, standards and ways of working, and apply them to your role. Be open to working across organisation and team boundaries to ensure we bring the best to our customers.

 Our Banking and Diversified Financials practice helps clients shape, define and deliver banking transformation initiatives across the entire span of the organisation (front office to back office). This encompasses driving process improvement and process digitisation to enhance customer experience and delivery straight-through digital processing and self-service across the bank.

Key areas of focus are around wealth management, payments, structured products and money market products. Working closely with clients, product owners, and technical teams, you will gather, analyze, and document business processes and requirements to ensure successful delivery of banking software solutions aligned with strategic goals.

Key Responsibilities include:

  • Provision of specific TAP expertise to enable delivery teams
  • Gather requirements from the Business and work, document them with work with the TAP technical teams to translate the end user requirements to application/system requirements
  • Reviewing requirements documents provided by the clients
  • Build customization on TAP solution using the TAP scripting language
  • Performing code reviews, creating code review standards,
  • Mentoring and guiding the developers to adhere to the coding standards
  • Training the team members in TAP Business Analysis
  • Configuring TAP GUI, TAP WUI, Financial Servers and eco-system components like WTX / TTI / Actuate etc
  • Expertise in configuring & tailoring Strategies, Constraints, PTCC checks, Formats, Screens, Reports etc covering various F2B & B2f processes for Asset classes Securities, derivatives, Forex products, structured products, forwards and spots, money market products
  • Documenting functional specification and Test artefacts
  • Expertise in preparing meaningful, concise and aesthetically pleasing power point presentations
  • Conduct functional trainings on TAP
  • Collaborate with partners within and outside Capgemini to build assets & accelerators

Functional Skills:  

  • Minimum 10+ years’ experience as a TAP WUI or GUI SME with a large organisation.
  • Minimum 5+ years of non-TAP experience, preferably in Wealth Management, acting as BA Lead for at least 2 years.
  • Strong analysis skills with wealth expertise, possessing significant work experience and in-depth knowledge of wealth products like securities, Bonds, Mutual Funds, Structured Products, Derivatives, Forex, forwards, spots etc.
  • Understand the Wealth Management and Private Banking business and eco system – Custodian, Depository, Broker, Registrar etc
  • Experience preparing good quality Functional Design/Technical  specifications/Test cases.
  • Familiarity with Agile, Scrum in particular and the use of Jira.
  • Able to work as Team player as well as independently without any supervision.

 Soft Skills:

  • Strong client management skills
  • Confident and articulate - excellent verbal and communication skills
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Able to build relationship with business stakeholders and other team members
  • Ability to lead a team

Competitive compensation and benefits package:

  1. Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses
  2. Comprehensive benefits package
  3. Career development and training opportunities
  4. Flexible work arrangements (remote and/or office-based)
  5. Dynamic and inclusive work culture within a globally renowned group
  6. Private Health Insurance
  7. Retirement Benefits
  8. Paid Time Off
  9. Training & Development
  10. Performance Bonus

Note: Benefits differ based on employee level.
